SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] Enemies, causing it to [Critical|Critically Hit] more often but deal less damage with [Critical|Critical Hits].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其[Critical|暴击]几率提高，但[Critical|暴击]时造成的伤害降低。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that consume [Charges|Power, Frenzy or Endurance Charges] on use, giving them a chance not to remove each [Charges|Charge] while still gaining the benefits of consuming them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助使用时消耗[Charges|暴击球、狂怒球或耐力球]的技能，使其有几率不消耗每一种[Charges|能量球]，并依然获得消耗的效果。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing [Poison] it applies to also [ArmourBreak|Break] enemy [Armour|Armour]. Cannot support skills that [Consume] [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken] [Armour].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其在对敌人施加[Poison|中毒]效果的同时造成[Armour|护甲][ArmourBreak|破损]。无法辅助[Consume|消耗][Armour|护甲][ArmourBreak|完全破损]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that can [Poison|Poison] enemies, causing [Poison|Poisoned] enemies to gain Plague over time and explode in a Plague Burst on death. Cannot support the skills of [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助使敌人[Poison|中毒]的技能，使[Poison|中毒]的敌人持续受到顽疾影响，并且在被击败时造成毒爆发。无法辅助[Minion|召唤生物]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to be created in a circle instead but deal less [HitDamage|Hit] damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生一排墙体的技能，使其改为产生环形墙体，但造成的[HitDamage|击中]伤害降低。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to be created in a circle instead but deal less [HitDamage|Hit] damage and have lowered Area of Effect.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生一排墙体的技能，使其改为产生环形墙体，但[HitDamage|击中]伤害降低，效果范围缩小。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to instead be created along a fissure.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生一排墙体的技能，使其改为沿着裂缝创造。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to [Consume|Consume] [Freeze] on [Ignite|Igniting] a [Frozen] enemy to boost the effect of the [Ignite]. Cannot support skills that [Consume|Consume] [Freeze|Freeze] or [Ignite].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其[Ignite|点燃][Frozen|冻结]的敌人时[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]效果，以增强[Ignite|点燃]的效果。无法辅助会[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]或[Ignite|点燃]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies. Enemies [Shock|Shocked] by Supported Skills take a percentage of damage from [Ignite] as [Lightning] damage as well as [Fire] damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，被辅助技能[Shock|感电]的敌人，其受到的[Ignite|点燃]伤害将有一部分额外转化为[Lightning|闪电]伤害和[Fire|火焰]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which have a [Limit], increasing that [Limit] at the cost of their duration. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "[Limit]".
SupportText.zh: 辅助有[Limit|上限]的数量效果的技能，以缩短持续时间为代价提高数量[Limit|上限]。仅对明确标注“[Limit|上限]”词缀的技能生效。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which have a [Limit], increasing that [Limit] at the cost of their duration. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "[Limit]".
SupportText.zh: 辅助有[Limit|上限]的数量效果的技能，以缩短持续时间为代价提高数量[Limit|上限]。仅对明确标注“[Limit|上限]”词缀的技能生效。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which have a [Limit], doubling that [Limit], but [Curse|Cursing] yourself on Supported Skill use. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "[Limit]". Cannot support [Persistent] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助有[Limit|上限]数量效果的技能，使该[Limit|上限]翻倍，但使用被辅助技能时会[Curse|诅咒]你自己。仅对明确标注“[Limit|上限]”词缀的技能生效。无法辅助[Persistent|永久性]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill which can deal Damage. [Lightning] Damage from Supported Skills can inflict [Electrocute], but Supported Skills cannot inflict [Shock].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意造成伤害的技能。被辅助技能的[Lightning|闪电]伤害可以造成[Electrocute|触电]，但被辅助技能无法施加[Shock|感电]。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill which can deal damage. [Lightning] damage from Supported Skills can inflict [Electrocute], but Supported Skills cannot inflict [Shock]. Enemies slain while [Electrocute|Electrocuted] by Supported Skills explode, dealing a percentage of their maximum Life as [Lightning] damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意造成伤害的技能。被辅助技能的[Lightning|闪电]伤害可以造成[Electrocute|触电]，但被辅助技能无法施加[Shock|感电]。被辅助技能的[Electrocute|触电]击杀的敌人会爆炸，造成其最大生命一定百分比的[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that you can use, causing [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] recharge to begin immediately if you are [Stun|Stunned] while using it.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的任意技能，若你在使用技能时被[Stun|晕眩]，[EnergyShield|能量护盾]可以立即开始充能。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that you can use, triggering a blast of wind that [Knockback|Knocks Back] enemies if you are [Stun|Stunned] while using it.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的任意技能，使你在[Stun|晕眩]状态下使用时，触发一阵可[Knockback|击退]敌人的疾风。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing them to deal more damage to [Frozen] enemies but consume their [Freeze]. Cannot support skills that [Consume|Consume] [Freeze|Freeze].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其对[Frozen|冻结]的敌人造成更高的伤害，但会消耗敌人身上的[Freeze|冻结]。无法辅助[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing them to deal more damage to [Frozen] enemies but consume their [Freeze], leaving them [Chill|Chilled]. Cannot support skills that [Consume|Consume] [Freeze|Freeze].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其对[Frozen|冻结]的敌人造成更高的伤害，但会消耗敌人身上的[Freeze|冻结]，使其被[Chill|冰缓]。无法辅助[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冻结]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any [Spell] that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to [Consume|Consume] [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] on hit to trigger an Elemental Discharge. Cannot support the skills of [Minion|Minions] or skills which already [Consume|Consume] [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的[Spell|法术]，使其在击中时[Consume|消耗][ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]，触发一次元素解放。无法辅助[Minion|召唤生物]的技能，或已会[Consume|消耗][ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any damaging skill that you use yourself, causing it to deal significantly more damage but gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的任意伤害性技能，使其造成的伤害明显提升，但冷却时间变长。无法辅助本身具有冷却时间的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing enemies it [Ignite|Ignites] to have a chance to explode on death.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其[Ignite|点燃]的敌人被击败时有几率爆炸。

SupportText.en: Supports Herald Skills, making their triggered effects deal more damage at the expense of higher [Spirit] cost.
SupportText.zh: 辅助捷技能，使其触发效果造成更高伤害，但提高[Spirit|精魂]成本。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, making the [Buff] they grant more powerful.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益]的技能，使其[Buff|增益]效果更强。

SupportText.en: Supports any [Spell] that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to trigger a Mana Flare on [Critical|Critical Hit]. The Mana Flare consumes your Mana to deal [Fire] damage. Cannot support the skills of [Minion|Minions].

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing any [Pinned|Pin] buildup it inflicts to be stronger the closer the enemy is to you.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其对距离越近的敌人造成越高的[Pinned|定身]积蓄值。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] Enemies, causing it to build up [Stun|Stun] more quickly.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其积蓄[Stun|晕眩]的速度更快。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] Enemies, causing it to build up [Stun|Stun] more quickly.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其积蓄[Stun|晕眩]的速度更快。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] Enemies, causing it to build up [Stun|Stun] significantly more quickly, at the cost of Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其积蓄[Stun|晕眩]的速度大幅加快，但会牺牲伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that can be used while moving, allowing you to move faster while using them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可在移动时使用的技能，使你在使用时可以更快地移动。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, allowing its [Physical] damage to [Pinned|Pin] enemies but making it unable to [Stun].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其[Physical|物理]伤害可以对敌人造成[Pinned|定身]，但无法造成[Stun|晕眩]。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, allowing its [Physical] damage to [Pinned|Pin] enemies but making it unable to [Stun], as well as granting [Critical|Critial Hit Chance] against [Immobilised] enemies.

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, allowing its [Physical] damage to [Pinned|Pin] enemies but making it unable to [Stun]. [Pinned|Pin] buildup caused by Supported Skill is lessened, but [Pinned|Pin] duration is significantly longer.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其[Physical|物理]伤害可以对敌人造成[Pinned|定身]，但无法造成[Stun|晕眩]。被辅助技能造成的[Pinned|定身]积蓄降低，但[Pinned|定身]持续时间大幅延长。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, making it more likely to [Critical|Critically Hit] enemies on full life.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其更有可能对满血的敌人造成[Critical|暴击]。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill that [HitDamage|Hits] Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more [Flask] and [Charm] charges.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其击败的敌人提供更多[Flask|药剂]和[Charm|咒符]充能。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill that [HitDamage|Hits] Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more [Flask] and [Charm] charges.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其击败的敌人提供更多[Flask|药剂]和[Charm|咒符]充能。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing enemies it kills to grant more Mana Flask charges.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其击败敌人后获得更多的魔力药剂充能。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing enemies it kills to grant more Life Flask charges.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其击败敌人后获得更多的生命药剂充能。

SupportText.en: Supports skills which create [Minion|Minions], causing them to violently explode when reduced to [LowLife|Low Life].
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Minion|召唤生物]的技能，使召唤生物在[LowLife|低血]时剧烈爆炸。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, giving it a chance to gain an [Charges|Endurance Charge] when it [ArmourBreak|Fully Breaks] an enemy's [Armour].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其[ArmourBreak|完全粉碎]敌人的[Armour|护甲]时有几率获得一个[Charges|耐力球]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Curse] Skills, magnifying their power.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Curse|诅咒]技能，强化其力量。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that consume [Corpse|Corpses], giving them a chance to take effect without destroying the [Corpse].
SupportText.zh: 辅助消耗[Corpse|灵柩]的技能，使其有几率在产生效果时不摧毁[Corpse|灵柩]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Curse] skills. Supported skill [Trigger] Profane Decay on each target they curse to inflict a damaging [Debuff].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Curse|诅咒]技能，被辅助技能每次诅咒一个目标时，会[Trigger|触发]亵渎朽坏，对其施加造成伤害的[Debuff|减益状态]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Curse] skills, causing them to [Curse] enemies more quickly after being cast.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Curse|诅咒]技能，使其在施放后更快地[Curse|诅咒]敌人。

SupportText.en: Supports [Curse] skills, causing them to cover a larger area but take longer to [Curse] enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Curse|诅咒]技能，使其[Curse|诅咒]更大范围的敌人，但需要更长的生效时间。

SupportText.en: Supports damaging skills you use yourself, draining the life from one of your [Minion|Minions] on use in order to boost the skill's damage. Only takes effect if you have a [Minion] with enough life to drain the full amount.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的伤害性技能，使用时吸取你的一个[Minion|召唤生物]的生命，以提升技能的伤害。仅在你的[Minion|召唤生物]拥有足量的生命能够吸取时生效。

SupportText.en: Supports damaging skills you use yourself, draining the life from one of your [Minion|Minions] on use in order to boost the skill's damage. Only takes effect if you have a [Minion] with enough life to drain the full amount.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的伤害性技能，使用时吸取你的一个[Minion|召唤生物]的生命，以提升技能的伤害。仅在你的[Minion|召唤生物]拥有足量的生命能够吸取时生效。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that create [Persistent] [Minion|Minions], causing those [Minion|Minions] to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a short duration.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够产生[Persistent|永久性][Minion|召唤生物]的技能，使[Minion|召唤生物]在受到致命伤害后仍会继续战斗，并在短时间内死亡。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that create [Persistent] [Minion|Minions], causing those [Minion|Minions] to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a duration. [Minion|Minions] from Supported Skills gain [SoulEaterMonster|Soul Eater] and a burst of speed on entering this state.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够产生[Persistent|永久性][Minion|召唤生物]的技能，使[Minion|召唤生物]在受到致命伤害后仍会继续战斗，持续一段时间后才会死亡。被辅助技能召唤的[Minion|召唤生物]在进入此状态时，获得[SoulEaterMonster|噬魂者]和速度爆发。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing you to recover Life when it [CullingStrike|Culls] an enemy.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使你在[CullingStrike|终结]一个敌人时回复生命。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing you to recover Mana when it [CullingStrike|Culls] an enemy.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使你在[CullingStrike|终结]一个敌人时回复魔力。

SupportText.en: Supports damaging skills you use yourself. Killing a [Shock|Shocked] enemy with supported skills imbues your damage with [Lightning] damage for a short time.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的造成伤害的技能，使用被辅助技能击败一个[Shock|感电]的敌人后，你在短时间内附加[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, allowing it to inflict an extra [Poison] on enemies but shortening the duration of those [Poison|Poisons].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其对敌人造成额外的[Poison|中毒]效果，但缩短[Poison|中毒]的持续时间。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that can generate [Charges], giving them a chance to generate an additional [Charges|Charge] when they do so.
SupportText.zh: 辅助生成[Charges|能量球]的技能，使其在生成[Charges|能量球]时有几率额外生成一个。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that can generate [Charges], giving them a chance to generate an additional [Charges|Charge] when they do so, as well as a chance to generate an additional [Charges|Charge] of a random type.
SupportText.zh: 辅助生成[Charges|能量球]的技能，使其在生成[Charges|能量球]时有几率额外生成一个，并有几率额外产生一个随机类型的[Charges|能量球]。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that can [Empowered|Empower] skills other than themselves, causing skills they [Empowered|Empower] to deal more damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Empowered|强化]其他技能的技能，使其[Empowered|强化]的技能造成更高伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that can [Empowered|Empower] skills other than themselves, causing skills they [Empowered|Empower] to [CullingStrike|Cull] enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Empowered|强化]其他技能的技能，使其[Empowered|强化]的技能可以[CullingStrike|终结]敌人。

SupportText.en: Supports [Warcry] skills, causing them to grant you [Rage] on use depending on counted monster [Power].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Warcry|战吼]技能，使你在使用时根据怪物的[Power|威力值]而获得[Rage|怒火]。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill, causing [ArmourBreak|Armour Break] it inflicts to be stronger.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意技能，使其造成的[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]效果更强。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill, causing [ArmourBreak|Armour Break] it inflicts to be stronger.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意技能，使其造成的[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]效果更强。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill, causing [ArmourBreak|Armour Break] it inflicts to be stronger. [ArmourBreak|Fully Breaking Armour] with Supported Skills permanently increases the [Physical] Damage taken by those affected, up to a cap.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意技能，使其造成的[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]更强。被辅助技能[ArmourBreak|完全粉碎护甲]时，永久增加受影响目标受到的[Physical|物理]伤害，该效果有上限。

SupportText.en: Supports any damaging skill that you use or [Trigger] yourself, causing it to spend [Rage] to deal more damage. If you don't have enough [Rage] to spend, the damage bonus will not apply.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意你使用或[Trigger|触发]的伤害性技能，使其消耗[Rage|怒火]以造成更高伤害。如果你没有足够的[Rage|怒火]可供消耗，伤害加成不会生效。

SupportText.en: Supports any damaging skill that you use or [Trigger] yourself, causing it to spend [Rage] to deal more damage, with a chance to skip spending [Rage] while still benefitting as though it had. If you don't have enough [Rage] to spend, the damage bonus will not apply.

SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Totem|图腾]的技能。被辅助技能产生的[Totem|图腾]生成血脉源泉，为范围内的[Allies|友军][LifeLeech|偷取生命]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems]. [Totem|Totems] created by supported Skills generate a Font of Mana which will [ManaLeech|Leech Mana] to [Allies] within it.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Totem|图腾]的技能。被辅助技能产生的[Totem|图腾]生成魔力源泉，为范围内的[Allies|友军][ManaLeech|偷取魔力]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems]. [Totem|Totems] created by supported Skills generate a Font of Rage which will [RageLeech|Leech Rage] to [Allies] within it.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Totem|图腾]的技能。被辅助技能产生的[Totem|图腾]生成怒火源泉，为范围内的[Allies|友军][RageLeech|偷取怒火]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Slam|Slams] you use yourself, giving them a chance to create an [Aftershock].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Slam|猛击]，使其有几率产生[Aftershock|余震]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Slam|Slams] you use yourself, giving them a chance to create an [Aftershock].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Slam|猛击]，使其有几率产生[Aftershock|余震]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Slam] Skills. Supported Skills a chance to create an [Aftershock] as well as increased chance to cause [Aftershock|Aftershocks] the longer their [Attack] time
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Slam|猛击]技能。被辅助技能有几率造成[Aftershock|余震]，且[Attack|攻击]时间越长，造成[Aftershock|余震]的几率越高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Slam|Slams] you use yourself, causing them to create simultaneous [Aftershock|Aftershocks] behind the [Slam], but lowering [Aftershock] damage and area of effect with Supported Skills. Cannot Support Skills which create Fissures.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Slam|猛击]，使其在[Slam|猛击]后同时产生一道[Aftershock|余震]，但会降低被辅助技能的[Aftershock|余震]伤害与影响范围。无法辅助会产生裂缝的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing them to create [ConsecratedGround|Consecrated Ground] when you land.
SupportText.zh: 辅助跃入空中的技能，使其在你落地时产生[ConsecratedGround|奉献地面]。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill which creates [RunicInscription|Runic Inscriptions] when Cast, causing those [RunicInscription|Runic Inscriptions] to trigger Burning Inscription when they expire. Burning Inscription is a [Spell] which creates [IgnitedGround|Ignited Ground] based off of your Maximum Mana.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意施放时产生[RunicInscription|铭刻符文]的技能，使[RunicInscription|铭刻符文]效果结束时产生燃烧铭文。燃烧铭文属于[Spell|法术]，会根据你的魔力上限造成[IgnitedGround|点燃地面]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能，使其额外装填一发弩箭，但会牺牲装填速度。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能，使其额外装填一发弩箭，但会牺牲装填速度。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed. Supported Skills will also automatically reload when they [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] an enemy.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能，使其额外装填一发弩箭，但会牺牲装填速度。辅助的技能还会在使敌人[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]时自动装填。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills, causing them to load multiple extra bolts and attack faster. Supported Skills cannot reload normally, instead loading bolts when you Dodge.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能，使其装填多发额外弩箭并提升击发速度。被辅助技能无法正常装填，改为在闪避时进行装填。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills, causing them to automatically reload when they [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] an enemy.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能，使其令敌人[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]时自动装填。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能，使其射击时有几率不消耗弩箭。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能，使其射击时有几率不消耗弩箭。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing, at the cost of Reload speed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能，使其射击时有几率不消耗弩箭，但会牺牲装填速度。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] Skills, causing them to load a bolt into all [Crossbow] [Ammunition] on kill.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩]技能，击败敌人时为所有[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]装填一发弩箭。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills, causing them to Reload bolts significantly faster.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能，使其装填弩箭的速度大幅加快。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] Skills, granting them more damage for each bolt reloaded by that Skill in the last 6 seconds.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩]技能，该技能过去 6 秒内每装填一发弩箭都会提高它造成的伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] Skills, granting them more damage for each bolt reloaded by that Skill in the last 8 seconds.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩]技能，该技能过去 8 秒内每装填一发弩箭都会提高它造成的伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Minion|Minions], causing your Skills which can target [Minion|Minions] to prioritise targeting [Minion|Minions] from the Supported Skill before your other [Minion|Minions] where possible.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够产生[Minion|召唤生物]的技能，使你以[Minion|召唤生物]为目标的技能，优先选中被辅助技能产生的[Minion|召唤生物]，而非其他[Minion|召唤生物]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Minion|Minions], causing your Skills which can target [Minion|Minions] to prioritise targeting [Minion|Minions] from the Supported Skill before your other [Minion|Minions] where possible, as well as causing them to always be considered Detonatable.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够产生[Minion|召唤生物]的技能，使你以[Minion|召唤生物]为目标的技能，优先选中被辅助技能产生的[Minion|召唤生物]，而非其他[Minion|召唤生物]，并使其总是被视为可引爆的。

SupportText.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Modifiers to Melee damage also apply to Spell damage for supported skill
SupportText.zh: 近战伤害的词缀也适用于被辅助技能造成的法术伤害

SupportText.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Modifiers to Melee damage also apply to Projectile damage for supported skill
SupportText.zh: 近战伤害的词缀也适用于被辅助技能造成的投射物伤害

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create Fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional secondary Fissures which branch off from the primary fissure, with lowered area of effect and Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助在地上产生裂缝的技能，使其产生额外的次级裂缝。次级裂缝从主裂缝分支出来，效果范围和伤害降低。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create Fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional secondary Fissures which branch off from the primary fissure, with lowered area of effect and Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助在地上产生裂缝的技能，使其产生额外的次级裂缝。次级裂缝从主裂缝分支出来，效果范围和伤害降低。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create an additional fissure at the cost of damage and speed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助在地上产生裂缝的技能，使其产生一道额外的裂缝，但会牺牲伤害和攻击速度。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional fissures at the cost of damage and speed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助在地上产生裂缝的技能，使其产生额外的裂缝，但会牺牲伤害和攻击速度。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create many additional fissures at the cost of damage, speed, and area of effect.
SupportText.zh: 辅助在地上产生裂缝的技能，使其产生大量额外的裂缝，但会牺牲伤害、攻击速度和效果范围。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that create Ground Surfaces, causing those surfaces to last longer.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生地面效果的技能，使地面效果的持续时间延长。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill which creates [Projectile|Projectiles], giving those [Projectile|Projectiles] a chance to [Chain] when impacting terrain.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Projectile|投射物]的技能，使[Projectile|投射物]击中地形时有几率[Chain|连锁]。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill which creates [Projectile|Projectiles], giving those [Projectile|Projectiles] a chance to [Chain] when impacting terrain.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Projectile|投射物]的技能，使[Projectile|投射物]击中地形时有几率[Chain|连锁]。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill which creates [Projectile|Projectiles], causing those [Projectile|Projectiles] to [Chain] when impacting terrain, at the cost of any additional [Projectile|Projectiles], as well as causing them to always [Pierce].
SupportText.zh: 辅助创造[Projectile|投射物]的技能，使[Projectile|投射物]撞击地形时[Chain|连锁]，但会失去任何额外[Projectile|投射物]，并使其总是[Pierce|穿透]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], causing those Skills to place [Totem|Totems] much more quickly.
SupportText.zh: 辅助放置[Totem|图腾]的技能，使技能放置[Totem|图腾]的速度大幅加快。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], causing those Skills to place [Totem|Totems] much more quickly.
SupportText.zh: 辅助放置[Totem|图腾]的技能，使技能放置[Totem|图腾]的速度大幅加快。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], causing those Skills to place [Totem|Totems] much more quickly. [Totem|Totems] created by Supported Skills have increased [Attack] and Cast Speed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助放置[Totem|图腾]的技能，使技能放置[Totem|图腾]的速度大幅加快。[Totem|图腾]在被辅助技能创造后的短时间内提高[Attack|攻击]和施法速度。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which have a [DetonationTime|Detonation Time], causing those Skills to have much higher [DetonationTime|Detonation Time] and detonation damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助具有[DetonationTime|引爆时间]的技能，使技能的[DetonationTime|引爆时间]和引爆伤害大幅提高。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which have a [DetonationTime|Detonation Time], causing those Skills to have much higher [DetonationTime|Detonation Time] and detonation damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助具有[DetonationTime|引爆时间]的技能，使技能的[DetonationTime|引爆时间]和引爆伤害大幅提高。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which fire [Grenade|Grenades], giving fired [Grenade|Grenades] a chance to activate again, but lengthening their cooldowns.
SupportText.zh: 辅助发射[Grenade|榴弹]的技能，使发射的[Grenade|榴弹]有几率再次激活，但延长冷却时间。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which apply [Exposure] to Enemies, increasing the effect of applied [Exposure].
SupportText.zh: 辅助对敌人施加[Exposure|曝露]的技能，提高施加的[Exposure|曝露]的效果。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems]. [Totem|Totems] created by Supported Skills have additional [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances].
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Totem|图腾]的技能。被辅助技能产生的[Totem|图腾]具有额外的[ElementalDamage|元素][Resistances|抗性]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems]. [Totem|Totems] created by Supported Skills have additional [ElementalDamage|Elemental] [Resistances].
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Totem|图腾]的技能。被辅助技能产生的[Totem|图腾]具有额外的[ElementalDamage|元素][Resistances|抗性]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Spell] Skills that [HitDamage|Hit] Enemies and you cast yourself, boosting Damage at the cost of Cast Speed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己施放的[HitDamage|击中]敌人的[Spell|法术]技能，增强伤害但牺牲施法速度。

SupportText.en: Supports [Projectile] [Spell|Spells]. Supported [Spell|Spells] have a chance to fire many additional [Projectile|Projectiles] in a circle.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Projectile|投射物][Spell|法术]。被辅助[Spell|法术]有几率额外环形发射大量[Projectile|投射物]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Projectile] [Spell|Spells]. Supported [Spell|Spells] have a chance to fire many additional [Projectile|Projectiles] in a circle.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Projectile|投射物][Spell|法术]。被辅助[Spell|法术]有几率额外环形发射大量[Projectile|投射物]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Projectile] [Spell|Spells]. Supported [Spell|Spells] have an increasingly higher chance to fire many additional [Projectile|Projectiles] in a circle, resetting when they do.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Projectile|投射物][Spell|法术]。被辅助[Spell|法术]额外环形发射大量[Projectile|投射物]的几率越来越高，触发时重置几率。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill which creates [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals], causing them to be created with lower Life.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[IceCrystals|冰晶]的技能，使其产生的冰晶具有较低的生命。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill which creates [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals], causing them to be created with higher Life.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[IceCrystals|冰晶]的技能，使其产生的冰晶具有较高的生命。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which deal Damage, increasing the maximum [Physical] Damage of their [HitDamage|Hits].
SupportText.zh: 辅助造成伤害的技能，使其造成的[HitDamage|击中][Physical|物理]伤害上限提高。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which deal Damage, raising [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] dealt for each Skill used [Recently] of a different [ElementalDamage|Elemental] type. Cannot support [Minion] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助造成伤害的技能，[Recently|近期]每使用一个不同的[ElementalDamage|元素]类型的技能，其造成的[ElementalDamage|元素伤害]提高。无法辅助[Minion|召唤生物]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Spell] Skills which cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits]. Using supported [Spell|Spells] will cause you to [Sacrifice] a portion of your Life on use, gaining extra [Chaos] Damage in exchange. Does not support [Persistent] Skills, [Minion] Skills, or [Trigger|Triggered] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助造成[HitDamage|伤害性击中]的[Spell|法术]技能。使用被辅助的[Spell|法术]会使你[Sacrifice|牺牲]一部分生命，并获得额外的[Chaos|混沌]伤害。无法辅助[Persistent|永久性]技能、[Minion|召唤生物]技能或[Trigger|触发]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Nova] Skills, causing those Skills to take place at the targeted location when used instead of around you.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Nova|新星]技能，使用这些技能时不再在你的周围生效，改为在目标位置生效。

SupportText.en: Supports [Strike] Skills. Supported Skills have a chance to build additional [Combo] on [HitDamage|Hit]. Cannot support Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Strike|打击]技能。被辅助技能[HitDamage|击中]时有几率积累额外的[Combo|连击]。无法辅助[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] Enemies. Supported Skills gain increased [Critical|chance to Critically Hit] against [Immobilised] Enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。被辅助技能对[Immobilised|不可移动]的敌人具有更高的[Critical|暴击率]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills gain [Combo] when you successfully [Strike] Enemies with other [Melee] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills reset their [Combo] on use, dealing more Damage the higher [Combo] you had on use. Cannot support skills which already gain [Combo]. Cannot modify the Skills of [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。使用其他[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]成功[Strike|打击]敌人会使被辅助技能获得[Combo|连击]。使用被辅助技能时重置[Combo|连击]，使用时具有的[Combo|连击]越高，造成的伤害越高。无法辅助本身获得[Combo|连击]的技能。无法修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills gain [Combo] when you successfully [Strike] Enemies with other [Melee] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills reset their [Combo] on use, dealing more Damage the higher [Combo] you had on use. Cannot support skills which already gain [Combo]. Cannot modify the Skills of [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。使用其他[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]成功[Strike|打击]敌人会使被辅助技能获得[Combo|连击]。使用被辅助技能时重置[Combo|连击]，使用时具有的[Combo|连击]越高，造成的伤害越高。无法辅助本身获得[Combo|连击]的技能。无法修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that you use yourself. Supported Skills will consume a [Charges|Power Charge] on use if possible, and will be much more likely to [Critical|Critically Hit] if they do. Supported Skills cannot generate [Charges|Power Charges]. Cannot Support Skills which consume [Charges|Power Charges].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的技能。使用被辅助技能时会尽可能消耗一个[Charges|暴击球]，消耗时有更高的可能[Critical|暴击]。被辅助技能无法产生[Charges|暴击球]。无法辅助会消耗[Charges|暴击球]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher Area of Effect but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的任意技能，使其效果范围明显提高，但冷却时间变长。无法辅助本身具有冷却时间的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any damaging Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher chance to [Critical|Critically Hit], but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的任意伤害性技能，使其[Critical|暴击率]明显提高，但冷却时间变长。无法辅助本身具有冷却时间的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any damaging Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher chance to inflict [Ailments] on hit, but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的任意伤害性技能，使其击中时造成[Ailments|异常状态]的几率明显提高，但冷却时间变长。无法辅助本身具有冷却时间的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Meta] Skills. Supported Skills gain a chance to partially Refund a portion of [Energy] cost when [Trigger|Triggering] or [Invoke|Invoking] other Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Meta|非凡]技能。被辅助技能[Trigger|触发]或[Invoke|祈唤]其他技能时，有几率返还消耗的一部分[Energy|能量]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that you use yourself. Supported Skills will consume a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] on use if possible, and will gain significant [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed] if they do, but cannot generate [Charges|Frenzy Charges]. Cannot Support Skills which consume [Charges|Frenzy Charges].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的技能。使用被辅助技能时会尽可能消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]，消耗时大幅提高[SkillSpeed|技能速度]。被辅助技能无法产生[Charges|狂怒球]。无法辅助会消耗[Charges|狂怒球]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Offering] Skills. Supported Skills [Sacrifice] a portion of your life on use, but deal much more damage and have more powerful [Buff|Buffs] in return.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Offering|奉献]技能。使用被辅助的技能会使你[Sacrifice|牺牲]一部分生命，但造成的伤害大幅提高，并且产生更强大的[Buff|增益状态]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Offering] Skills. Supported Skills [Sacrifice] a portion of your life on use. While [Offering] spikes from Supported Skills persist, you are periodically granted a [Charges|Power Charge]. When spikes from Supported Skills die, Regenerate a percentage of your maximum Life and Mana per second based on the duration the [Offering] persisted.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Offering|奉献]技能。使用被辅助技能会使你[Sacrifice|牺牲]一部分生命。当被辅助技能产生的[Offering|奉献]尖刺存留期间，你会周期性获得一个[Charges|暴击球]。当尖刺消失时，基于该[Offering|奉献]技能的持续时长，每秒回复一定比例的最大生命与魔力。

SupportText.en: Supports [Offering] Skills. Supported Skills have increased [Buff] effect and deal more damage, but will target an additional skeletal [Minion] when cast. If there is not an additional skeletal [Minion] to target, no damage or [Buff] effect will be granted.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Offering|奉献]技能。被辅助技能的[Buff|增益状态]效果提高，造成更高的伤害，但施放时会额外以一个魔侍[Minion|召唤生物]为目标。如果没有额外的魔侍[Minion|召唤生物]，则不会提高伤害或[Buff|增益状态]效果。

SupportText.en: Supports Invocation Skills which [Trigger] other Skills. Supported Skills have significantly higher Maximum [Energy].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Trigger|触发]其他技能的祈求技能。被辅助技能的[Energy|能量]上限大幅提高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Meta] Skills. Supported Skills generate [Energy] significantly faster.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Meta|非凡]技能。被辅助技能产生[Energy|能量]的速度大幅加快。

SupportText.en: Supports [Meta] Skills. Supported Skills generate [Energy] significantly faster.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Meta|非凡]技能。被辅助技能产生[Energy|能量]的速度大幅加快。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Remnant|Remnants], allowing those [Remnant|Remnants] to be collected from further away.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Remnant|残片]的技能，使[Remnant|残片]能够从更远处收集。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Remnant|Remnants], allowing those [Remnant|Remnants] to be collected from further away, with a chance to create an additional [Remnant].
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Remnant|残片]的技能，使[Remnant|残片]能够从更远处收集，并有几率创造额外的[Remnant|残片]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [Trigger] other Skills. Skills [Trigger|Triggered] by Supported Skills have their Damage randomly raised or lowered when [Trigger|Triggered], as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when [Trigger|Triggered].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Trigger|触发]其他技能的技能。被辅助技能所[Trigger|触发]的技能的伤害在被[Trigger|触发]时随机增减，[Trigger|触发]时还会随机恢复一定比例的消耗。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [Trigger] other Skills. Skills [Trigger|Triggered] by Supported Skills have their Damage, Area of Effect, and [Projectile] Speed randomly raised or lowered when [Trigger|Triggered], as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when [Trigger|Triggered].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Trigger|触发]其他技能的技能。被辅助技能[Trigger|触发]的技能在被[Trigger|触发]时伤害、效果范围和[Projectile|投射物]速度随机增减，被[Trigger|触发]时还会随机回复一定消耗。

SupportText.en: Supports [Spell] Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage while you are above 90% of your Maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Spell|法术]技能。当你的魔力高于魔力上限的 90% 时，被辅助技能造成更高的伤害。不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Spell] Skills. Supported Skills have increased Mana cost [Efficiency] and deal more damage while you are above 90% of your maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Spell|法术]技能。被辅助技能的魔力消耗[Efficiency|效能]提高，并且当你的魔力高于魔力上限的 90% 时，技能造成更高的伤害。不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Minion] Skills. Supported [Minion|Minions] deal more damage and have increased [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate] with [Command] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Minion|召唤生物]技能，被辅助的[Minion|召唤生物]造成更高的伤害，[Command|命令]技能的[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]提高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Minion] Skills. Supported [Minion|Minions] deal more damage and have increased [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate] with [Command] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Minion|召唤生物]技能，被辅助的[Minion|召唤生物]造成更高的伤害，[Command|命令]技能的[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]提高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Minion] Skills. Supported [Minion|Minions] have significantly increased [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Rate] with [Command] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Minion|召唤生物]技能，被辅助的[Minion|召唤生物][Command|命令]技能的[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]大幅提高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Minion|Minions] which have [Command] Skills. Supported [Minion|Minions] have massively increased cooldown recovery speed for [Command] Skills they use, but deal no damage with non-[Command] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助具有[Command|命令]技能的[Minion|召唤生物]。被辅助的[Minion|召唤生物]的[Command|命令]技能冷却回复速度大幅加快，但是非[Command|命令]技能无法造成伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which require [Combo] to use. Supported Skills lose their [Combo] stacks after a longer delay spent not gaining any [Combo].
SupportText.zh: 被辅助技能需要[Combo|连击]才能使用。较长时间未获得[Combo|连击]后，被辅助技能会失去[Combo|连击]层数。

SupportText.en: Supports [Grenade] Skills. [Grenade|Grenades] from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land, but doing lower damage when they detonate.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Grenade|榴弹]技能，被辅助技能的[Grenade|榴弹]不会弹跳，而是停留在初始落点，引爆时造成的伤害较低。

SupportText.en: Supports [Grenade] Skills. [Grenade|Grenades] from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Grenade|榴弹]技能，被辅助技能的[Grenade|榴弹]不会弹跳，而是停留在初始落点。

SupportText.en: Supports [Grenade] Skills. [Grenade|Grenades] from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land. [Grenade|Grenades] from Supported Skills have longer cooldowns, and a chance to detonate an additional time.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Grenade|榴弹]技能。被辅助技能的[Grenade|榴弹]不会弹跳，而是停在初始落点。被辅助技能的[Grenade|榴弹]冷却时间更长，有几率额外引爆一次。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain much more damage the closer you are to being [HeavyStunPlayer|Heavily Stunned].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。你越接近[HeavyStunPlayer|重度晕眩]状态，被辅助技能造成的伤害越高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain much more damage and are more capable of [Stun|Stunning] Enemies the closer you are to being [HeavyStunPlayer|Heavily Stunned].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。你越接近[HeavyStunPlayer|重度晕眩]状态，被辅助技能造成的伤害越高，[Stun|晕眩]敌人的能力越强。

SupportText.en: Supports [Slam] Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain multiple independent chances to cause [Aftershock|Aftershocks], but deal less Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Slam|猛击]技能。被辅助技能获得独立的[Aftershock|余震]几率，但造成的伤害降低。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself which fire [Projectile|Projectiles], [Seal|Sealing] them over time. The [Seal|Seals] are broken when used, causing additional [Projectile|Projectiles] to be fired. [Projectile|Projectiles] from Supported Skills are fired in random directions. Cannot Support Skills which require [Combo], have a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的发射[Projectile|投射物]的[Attack|攻击]技能，使其随时间获得[Seal|封印]。使用时打破[Seal|封印]，发射额外[Projectile|投射物]。来自被辅助技能的[Projectile|投射物]会向随机方向发射。无法辅助需要[Combo|连击]、有冷却时间或能获得封印的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack|Attacks] you use yourself. Supported Skills gain more [Attack] speed each time you use them, but will become unusable if used too frequently in a short time frame. [Sustained] Skills will instead gain [Attack] speed periodically while being used.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Attack|攻击]。被辅助技能每次使用都会提高[Attack|攻击]速度，但在短时间内使用过多就会无法使用。若为[Sustained|持续性技能]，则在使用期间会定期获得[Attack|攻击]速度提升。

SupportText.en: Supports [Projectile] [Attack] Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain Voltaic Charge as you move, up to a maximum. When used, Supported Skills expend that Charge to gain extra [Lightning] Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能在你移动时获得电伏充能，最多积累到最大值。使用被辅助技能时消耗充能，获得额外的[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] Enemies. Supported Skills trigger Bone Shrapnel explosions when killing [Pinned] Enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。被辅助技能击败[Pinned|定身]的敌人时触发钙质碎片爆破。

SupportText.en: Supports [Bow] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an [Attack] with Supported Skill matches that direction. [Attack|Attacks] from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction deal much more Damage. Cannot Support [Channelling|Channelled] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Bow|弓类]的[Attack|攻击]。被辅助技能指示四个方向之一，被辅助技能的[Attack|攻击]与指示方向相同时改变指示方向。被辅助技能对指示方向的[Attack|攻击]会造成更高的伤害。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Bow] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an [Attack] with Supported Skill matches that direction. [Attack|Attacks] from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction deal much more Damage. Cannot Support [Channelling|Channelled] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Bow|弓类]的[Attack|攻击]。被辅助技能指示四个方向之一，被辅助技能的[Attack|攻击]与指示方向相同时改变指示方向。被辅助技能对指示方向的[Attack|攻击]会造成更高的伤害。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Bow] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an [Attack] with Supported Skill matches that direction. [Attack|Attacks] from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction fire additional [Projectile|Projectiles]. Cannot Support [Channelling|Channelled] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Bow|弓类]的[Attack|攻击]。被辅助技能指示四个方向之一，被辅助技能的[Attack|攻击]与指示方向相同时改变指示方向。被辅助技能与指示方向相同的[Attack|攻击]发射额外[Projectile|投射物]。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which you use yourself which can deal damage. Supported Skills gain an [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] cost equal to your [Intelligence], while also dealing more non-[DamagingAilments|Ailment] Damage over time based off of your [Intelligence]. Cannot support [Channelling] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的能够造成伤害的技能。被辅助技能获得等同于你的[Intelligence|智慧]的[EnergyShield|能量护盾]消耗，同时会根据你的[Intelligence|智慧]造成更高的非[DamagingAilments|异常状态]的持续伤害。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Bow] [Attack|Attacks]. Every third shot with Supported Skills restores a portion of its Mana cost and [Gain|Gains] Damage as extra [Lightning] Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Bow|弓类][Attack|攻击]。每当第三次使用被辅助技能进行射击时,会恢复一定比例的魔力消耗，并使造成的伤害[Gain|获得]额外的[Lightning|闪电]伤害.

SupportText.en: Supports [Bow] [Attack|Attacks]. Every third shot with Supported Skills [Gain|Gains] Damage as extra [Lightning] Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Bow|弓类][Attack|攻击]。被辅助技能的每第三次射击[Gain|获得]额外[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills consume a [Corpse] on use, dealing more [Chaos] Damage if they do.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的技能。被辅助技能在使用时消耗一个[Corpse|灵柩]，消耗时造成更高的[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills consume many [Corpse|Corpses] on use, dealing more [Chaos] Damage per [Corpse] consumed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的技能。被辅助技能使用时消耗大量[Corpse|灵柩]，每消耗一个[Corpse|灵柩]就能造成更高的[Chaos|混沌]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Channelling] Skills you use yourself, causing them to deal more damage the longer they have been [Channelling|Channelled].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能，使其[Channelling|吟唱]的时间越久，造成的伤害越高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Channelling] Skills you use yourself, causing them to deal more damage the longer they have been [Channelling|Channelled].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能，使其[Channelling|吟唱]的时间越久，造成的伤害越高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Channelling] Skills you use yourself, granting you higher [StunThreshold|Stun Threshold] while [Channelling] them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能，使你在[Channelling|吟唱]期间提高[StunThreshold|晕眩阈值]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Channelling] Skills you use yourself, granting you higher [StunThreshold|Stun Threshold] and [AilmentThreshold|Ailment Threshold]  while [Channelling] them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能，使你在[Channelling|吟唱]期间提高[StunThreshold|晕眩阈值]和[AilmentThreshold|异常状态阈值]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can fire [Projectile|Projectiles]. Initial [Projectile|Projectile] created by Supported Skills will always [Pierce] [Ignite|Ignited] Enemies, but Supported Skills cannot inflict [Ignite] themselves.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可以发射[Projectile|投射物]的技能。被辅助技能的初始[Projectile|投射物]必定[Pierce|穿透][Ignite|被点燃]的敌人，但被辅助技能自身无法施加[Ignite|点燃]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can fire [Projectile|Projectiles]. [Projectile|Projectiles] from Supported Skills always [Fork] when the initial [Projectile] [HitDamage|Hits] [Frozen] Enemies, but Supported Skills cannot build up [Freeze] themselves.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可以发射[Projectile|投射物]的技能。被辅助技能的初始[Projectile|投射物][HitDamage|击中][Frozen|被冻结]的敌人时，[Projectile|投射物]必定[Fork|分叉]，但被辅助技能自身无法累积[Freeze|冻结]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Projectile] Skills and Skills which can [Chain]. Supported Skills always [Chain] when initially [HitDamage|Hitting] a [Shock|Shocked] Enemy, but cannot themselves inflict [Shock]. Does not support Skills which cannot [Chain].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Projectile|投射物]技能和可以[Chain|连锁]的技能。被辅助技能第一次[HitDamage|击中][Shock|感电]的敌人时必定[Chain|连锁]，但自身无法施加[Shock|感电]。无法辅助不能[Chain|连锁]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which can [HitDamage|Hit] Enemies. Supported Skills [Gain] a percentage of their Damage as [Cold] Damage when you destroy [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用且能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。当你摧毁[IceCrystals|冰晶]时，被辅助技能[Gain|获得]一定比例的[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can Damage Enemies with [HitDamage|Hits], causing all sources of Damage [Gain|Gained] to instead be treated as Damage [Gain|Gained] as extra [Cold] for Supported Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人并造成伤害的技能，使从所有来源[Gain|获得]的伤害被视作被辅助技能[Gain|获得]的额外[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Warcry] Skills. Supported Skills [Consume] [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour] to trigger [Physical] Damage explosions on Enemies within their range but cannot themselves [ArmourBreak|Break Armour].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Warcry|战吼]技能。被辅助技能[Consume|消耗]范围内敌人的[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]以触发[Physical|物理]伤害爆炸，但本身无法[ArmourBreak|粉碎护甲]。

SupportText.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Supports Skills which gain Stages or Seals. Supported Skills have lower Maximum Stage or Seal count, but have a Minimum Stage or Seal count they cannot fall below.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够获得层数或封印的技能。被辅助技能的最大层数或封印数量降低，但不会降低至最小层数或封印数量以下。

SupportText.en: Supports [Curse] Skills you cast yourself. Supported Skills will consume [Charges|Power Charges] on use, gaining significant [Curse] duration if they do. Cannot Support Skills which consume [Charges|Power Charges].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己施放的[Curse|诅咒]技能。被辅助技能使用时可以消耗[Charges|暴击球]，消耗时大幅延长[Curse|诅咒]的持续时间。无法辅助会消耗[Charges|暴击球]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which deal Damage with [HitDamage|Hits]. When Supported Skills [Pinned|Pin] an Enemy, they also [Aggravate] [Bleeding] on that Enemy.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人并造成伤害的技能。被辅助技能使敌人[Pinned|定身]时，还会使利刃受到的[Bleeding|流血]变为[Aggravate|恶性]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Minion] Skills which summon [Reviving] [Minion|Minions]. Supported [Minion|Minions] deal significantly more Damage if they have [Reviving|Revived] [Recently].
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够召唤[Reviving|可复活的][Minion|召唤生物]的[Minion|召唤生物]技能。被辅助的[Minion|召唤生物]若[Recently|近期][Reviving|复活过]，则造成的伤害大幅提高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Bow] or [Spear] [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks] you use yourself. Supported Skills deal lower damage initially, but generate Spectral Projectiles, which deal more damage when they fire. Spectral Projectiles linger and will fire a short duration after no new Spectral Projectiles have been created. Cannot support [Channelling] Skills, Leaping skills, or skills which rain [Projectile|Projectiles] from above.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Bow|弓类]或[Spear|战矛][Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击]。被辅助技能造成的初始伤害降低，但会产生灵体投射物，发射时能造成更高的伤害。灵体投射物会持续保留，并在不再产生新的灵体投射物后的短时间内发射。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能、跳跃技能，以及使[Projectile|投射物]从天而降的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Melee [Attack|Attacks] you use yourself. Supported Skills [Consume] all [Charges|Endurance Charge] on use, causing you to restore a percentage of your maximum Life for each [Charges|Charge] [Consume|Consumed]. Cannot Support Skills which consume [Charges|Endurance Charges].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的近战[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能使用时[Consume|消耗]全部[Charges|耐力球]，每[Consume|消耗]一个[Charges|能量球]为你回复一定比例的最大生命。无法辅助会消耗[Charges|耐力球]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals]. Supported Skills create chilling areas which deal [Cold] Damage over time instead of creating [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals].
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[IceCrystals|冰晶]的技能。被辅助技能不再产生[IceCrystals|冰晶]，改为产生冰缓区域，持续造成[Cold|冰霜]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Persistent] [Minion|Minions]. Supported [Minion|Minions] will restore Life to nearby [Allies|Allied] [Minion|Minions] on death, as well as removing [Ailments] from those [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够产生[Persistent|永久性][Minion|召唤生物]的技能。被辅助的[Minion|召唤生物]被击败时使附近的[Allies|友军][Minion|召唤生物]回复生命，并移除这些[Minion|召唤生物]受到的[Ailments|异常状态]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can Damage Enemies. Enemies affected by Damage over time from Supported Skills which was not caused by a [DamagingAilments|Damaging Ailment] have reduced Life regeneration rate. Only the strongest instance of this [Debuff] will apply. Does not Support Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够对敌人造成伤害的技能。被辅助技能的非[DamagingAilments|伤害性异常状态]造成的持续伤害会使敌人的生命回复速度降低。仅有最强效的该[Debuff|减益状态]能够生效。无法辅助[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which Damage enemies with [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Life [Flask] charges, inflicting more powerful [Bleeding] based on Life [Flask] charges consumed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用且能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人并造成伤害的技能。被辅助技能会消耗一定比例的最大生命[Flask|药剂]充能，根据消耗的生命[Flask|药剂]充能造成更强的[Bleeding|流血]效果。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which Damage enemies with [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Life [Flask] charges, inflicting more powerful [Bleeding] based on Life [Flask] charges consumed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用且能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人并造成伤害的技能。被辅助技能会消耗一定比例的最大生命[Flask|药剂]充能，根据消耗的生命[Flask|药剂]充能造成更强的[Bleeding|流血]效果。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which damage enemies with [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Mana [Flask] charges, [Gain|Gaining] a percentage of damage as extra [Lightning] damage per Mana [Flask] charge consumed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用且能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人并造成伤害的技能。被辅助技能会消耗一定比例的最大魔力[Flask|药剂]充能，每消耗一层魔力[Flask|药剂]充能就[Gain|获得]一定比例的额外[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which damage enemies with [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Mana [Flask] charges, [Gain|Gaining] a percentage of damage as extra [Lightning] damage per Mana [Flask] charge consumed.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用且能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人并造成伤害的技能。被辅助技能会消耗一定比例的最大魔力[Flask|药剂]充能，每消耗一层魔力[Flask|药剂]充能就[Gain|获得]一定比例的额外[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够产生地面效果的技能，使产生的地面效果持续时间大幅延长。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer and only end when their duration expires.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够产生地面效果的技能，使产生的地面效果持续时间大幅延长，且仅会在持续时间结束时消失。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer as well as lowering the [CooldownRecovery|Cooldown Recovery Speed] of affected Enemies. Ground Surfaces from Supported Skills only end when their duration expires.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够产生地面效果的技能，使创造的地面效果持续时间大幅延长，并降低受影响敌人的[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复速度]。被辅助技能的地面效果只在持续时间结束时消失。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that generate [Remnant|Remnants], causing those [Remnant|Remnants] to affect [Allies] in your [Presence] when collected instead of you.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Remnant|残片]的技能，收集[Remnant|残片]时使其影响[Presence|在场]的[Allies|友军]，但不影响你。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Remnant|Remnants], making those [Remnant|Remnants] more powerful.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Remnant|残片]的技能，使[Remnant|残片]更加强大。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Remnant|Remnants], making those [Remnant|Remnants] more powerful, but delaying their effect.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Remnant|残片]的技能，使[Remnant|残片]更加强大，但延迟其效果。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Remnant|Remnants], making those [Remnant|Remnants] more powerful, but delaying their effect.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Remnant|残片]的技能，使[Remnant|残片]更加强大，但延迟其效果。

SupportText.en: Supports [Slam] Skills. Supported Skills that have a chance to [Aftershock] have increased chance to cause [Aftershock|Aftershocks] the longer their [Attack] time.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Slam|猛击]技能。被辅助技能拥有[Aftershock|余震]几率时，其[Attack|攻击]时间越长，造成[Aftershock|余震]的几率越高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills deal more Damage while you have a lower percentage of your Life remaining than the target struck, but less Damage when the reverse is true.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。当你的剩余生命比例低于击中的目标时，被辅助技能会造成更高的伤害，但反之会造成更低的伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging [HitDamage|Hits], causing base chance to inflict [Bleeding] with Supported Skills to instead apply to base chance to [Poison], and causing base chance to [Poison] to instead apply to [Bleeding].
SupportText.zh: 辅助造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能，使被辅助技能造成[Bleeding|流血]的基础几率改为对[Poison|中毒]的基础几率生效，[Poison|中毒]的基础几率生效改为对[Bleeding|流血]生效。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills always hit [Daze|Dazed] Enemies, but [Consume] [Daze] on [HitDamage|Hit], and cannot themselves inflict [Daze]. Cannot Support Skills which [Consume] [Daze].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能必定击中[Daze|恍惚]的敌人，但[HitDamage|击中]时[Consume|消耗][Daze|恍惚]，并且本身无法造成[Daze|恍惚]。无法辅助会[Consume|消耗][Daze|恍惚]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Slam] Skills you use yourself. [HitDamage|Hits] from Supported Skills are considered [CrushingBlow|Crushing Blows] against Enemies which are both [Ignite|Ignited] and [ArmourBreak|Fully Armour Broken]. [HitDamage|Hits] with Supported Skills that [HeavyStun|Heavily Stun] [Ignite|Ignited] and [ArmourBreak|Fully Armour Broken] Enemies will [Intimidate] them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Slam|猛击]技能。被辅助技能的[HitDamage|击中]对同时受到[Ignite|点燃]和[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]的目标视作[CrushingBlow|粉碎打击]。被辅助技能使[Ignite|点燃]和[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]的目标陷入[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]的[HitDamage|击中]还会[Intimidate|威吓]他们。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, a percentage of Damage taken is [Recoup|Recouped] as Life, with the percentage scaling higher the longer the [Attack] time of the Supported Skill. Cannot Support [Channelling] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。使用被辅助技能时，受到伤害的一定比例将被[Recoup|吸纳]为生命，被辅助技能的[Attack|攻击]时间越长该比例越高。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills you use yourself. Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent Supported Skills from being used while [Surrounded].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。[Surrounded|被包围]时，魔力不足不会使被辅助技能无法使用。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills deal more Damage with [Critical|Critical Hits], but [Critical|Critically Hitting] an Enemy with them will [Daze] you for a short time.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能的[Critical|暴击]造成更高的伤害，但对敌人造成[Critical|暴击]会使你短暂地陷入[Daze|恍惚]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills deal more [Melee] Damage for each [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailment] on Enemies they hit, but cannot themselves inflict [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能击中的敌人每受到一个[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]影响，造成的[Melee|近战]伤害都会提高，但其本身无法造成[ElementalAilments|元素异常状态]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Spell] Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, a percentage of Damage taken is [Recoup|Recouped] as Mana, with the percentage scaling higher the longer the Cast time of the Supported Skill. Cannot Support [Channelling] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Spell|法术]技能。使用被辅助技能时，受到伤害的一定比例将被[Recoup|吸纳]为魔力，被辅助技能的施法时间越长该比例越高。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Projectile|Projectiles]. Supported Skills deal more damage with [Projectile|Projectiles] if you have struck with a [Melee] [HitDamage|Hit] in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal [Melee] Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Projectile|投射物]的技能。如果你在过去八秒内造成过[Melee|近战][HitDamage|击中]，被辅助技能造成的[Projectile|投射物]伤害会提高，但其本身无法造成[Melee|近战]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Projectile|Projectiles]. Supported Skills deal more damage with [Projectile|Projectiles] if you have struck with a [Melee] [HitDamage|Hit] in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal [Melee] Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Projectile|投射物]的技能。如果你在过去八秒内造成过[Melee|近战][HitDamage|击中]，被辅助技能造成的[Projectile|投射物]伤害会提高，但其本身无法造成[Melee|近战]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Projectile|Projectiles]. Supported Skills deal more damage with [Projectile|Projectiles] if you have struck with a [Melee] [HitDamage|Hit] in the last two seconds, but cannot themselves deal [Melee] Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Projectile|投射物]的技能。如果你在过去两秒内造成过[Melee|近战][HitDamage|击中]，被辅助技能造成的[Projectile|投射物]伤害会提高，但其本身无法造成[Melee|近战]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills deal more [Melee] damage if you have struck with a [Projectile] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal [Projectile] Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]。如果你在过去八秒内造成过[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]，被辅助技能造成的[Melee|近战]伤害会提高，但其本身无法造成[Projectile|投射物]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills deal more [Melee] damage if you have struck with a [Projectile] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal [Projectile] Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]。如果你在过去八秒内造成过[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]，被辅助技能造成的[Melee|近战]伤害会提高，但其本身无法造成[Projectile|投射物]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills deal more [Melee] damage if you have struck with a [Projectile] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] in the last two seconds, but cannot themselves deal [Projectile] Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]。如果你在过去两秒内造成过[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]，被辅助技能造成的[Melee|近战]伤害会提高，但其本身无法造成[Projectile|投射物]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills which deal Damage in an Area. Supported Skills have significantly increased Area of Effect, but are less [Accuracy|Accurate] against nearby targets.
SupportText.zh: 辅助在范围内造成伤害的[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能的效果范围大幅提高，但对周围目标的[Accuracy|命中]降低。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use or [Trigger] yourself, which can cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits]. Supported Skills inflict more powerful [Ailments] if you are afflicted with those [Ailments] when you inflict them, while also removing from you any [Ailments|Ailment] that they inflict.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用或自己[Trigger|触发]的造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能。当你受到[Ailments|异常状态]影响时，被辅助技能造成的同类[Ailments|异常状态]更为强大，并且会移除你受到的同类[Ailments|异常状态]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills are more likely to [Critical|Critically Hit] [Blind|Blinded] Enemies, and deal more Damage with [Critical|Critical Hits] against [Blind|Blinded] Enemies, but cannot themselves inflict [Blind].
SupportText.zh: 辅助造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能。被辅助技能更有可能对[Blind|被致盲]的敌人造成[Critical|暴击]，对[Blind|被致盲]的敌人造成的[Critical|暴击]伤害提高，但其本身无法造成[Blind|致盲]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself which do not already have some [Conditional|Condition] for use. Supported Skills can only be used after you have moved a certain distance, but have massively increased [SkillSpeed|Skill Speed]. Cannot support Skills which have a cooldown.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用且不具有使用[Conditional|条件]的[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能只能在你移动了一定距离后使用，但会大幅提高[SkillSpeed|技能速度]。无法辅助具有冷却时间的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Channelling] Skills. While [Channelling] Supported Skills, you gain [Lightning] [Thorns] based off of your maximum Mana.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。在[Channelling|吟唱]被辅助技能时，你会根据魔力上限获得[Lightning|闪电][Thorns|荆棘]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself. [HitDamage|Hit] Damage from Supported Skills is [Lucky] if you are [Surrounded].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Attack|攻击]技能。如果你被[Surrounded|被包围]，被辅助技能的[HitDamage|击中]伤害[Lucky|特别幸运]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself. [HitDamage|Hit] Damage from Supported Skills is [Lucky] and Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent Supported Skills from being used if you are [Surrounded].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Attack|攻击]技能。如果你被[Surrounded|包围]，被辅助技能的[HitDamage|击中]伤害[Lucky|特别幸运]，魔力不足不会阻止被辅助技能的使用。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills grant [Volatility] on [Critical|Critical Hit].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能。被辅助技能[Critical|暴击]时产生[Volatility|无常]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which summon [Minion|Minions]. Supported [Minion|Minions] deal more Damage the more different kinds of [Reviving] [Minion|Minions] you have summoned.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够召唤出[Minion|召唤生物]的技能。你召唤的[Reviving|可复活的][Minion|召唤生物]类型越多，被辅助的[Minion|召唤生物]造成的伤害越高。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which summon [Persistent] [Minion|Minions]. Supported [Minion|Minions] are larger, have more Life, and deal more Damage, but cost significantly more [Spirit].
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够召唤[Persistent|永久性][Minion|召唤生物]的技能。被辅助的[Minion|召唤生物]体型变大，具有更多生命，造成更高的伤害，但大幅提高[Spirit|精魂]消耗。

SupportText.en: Supports Ranged [Spear] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills create Caltrops when [Projectile|Projectiles] they create reach the end of their flight.
SupportText.zh: 辅助远程[Spear|战矛][Attack|攻击]。被辅助技能的[Projectile|投射物]结束飞行时产生铁蒺藜。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills [Consume] [Bleeding] on [HitDamage|Hit] to create explosive blood-filled crystals, but cannot themselves inflict [Bleeding]. Cannot Support Skills which already [Consume] [Bleeding].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的可造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能[HitDamage|击中]时[Consume|消耗][Bleeding|流血]产生爆炸性血晶，但其本身无法造成[Bleeding|流血]。无法辅助已经[Consume|消耗][Bleeding|流血]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills are more capable of [Stun|Stunning] Enemies the closer you are to being [HeavyStunPlayer|Heavily Stunned].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。你距离[HeavyStunPlayer|重度晕眩]状态越近，被辅助技能使敌人[Stun|晕眩]的能力越强。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills cannot be used unless you have been stationary for a certain duration, but deal increasingly more damage the longer you are stationary. Cannot support Skills which have a cooldown or another usage [Conditional|Condition].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能。被辅助技能只有在你静止不动一段时间后才能使用，但静止的时间越长，造成的伤害越高。无法辅助具有冷却时间的技能或存在其他使用[Conditional|条件]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Remnant|Remnants], allowing those [Remnant|Remnants] to be collected from further away.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Remnant|残片]的技能，使[Remnant|残片]能够从更远处收集。

SupportText.en: Supports [Strike|Strikes] you use yourself, providing a powerful [AncestralBoost|Ancestral Boost] every few seconds. Cannot Support [Channelling|Channelled] Skills and does not modify Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Strike|打击]技能，每隔几秒提供强大的[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能，不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Strike|Strikes] you use yourself, providing a powerful [AncestralBoost|Ancestral Boost] every few seconds. Cannot Support [Channelling|Channelled] Skills and does not modify Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Strike|打击]技能，每隔几秒提供强大的[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能，不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Strike|Strikes] you use yourself, providing a powerful [AncestralBoost|Ancestral Boost] every second, at the cost of a damage penalty. Cannot Support [Channelling|Channelled] Skills and does not modify Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Strike|打击]技能，每隔几秒提供强大的[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]，但会受到伤害惩罚效果影响。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能，不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en:
Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills trigger Quill Burst, which deals your [Thorns] Damage in an Area around the target struck. Quill Burst can only be triggered on [HitDamage|Hit] after you've
[ThornsRetaliation|Retaliated with Thorns] Damage.
SupportText.zh:
辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能会触发棘刺爆发，对击中的目标周围的区域造成你的[Thorns|荆棘]伤害。只有当你[ThornsRetaliation|用荆棘进行反击]后，
才能在[HitDamage|击中]时触发棘刺爆发。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills you use yourself. [Attack|Attacking] with Supported Skills will cycle through various effects, with the first [Attack] in sequence inflicting [Hobble] on you. The second and third [Attack|Attacks] in sequence will powerfully scale chance to [Critical|Critically Hit] and overall damage, respectively, at which point the cycle will reset. Cannot Support [Channelling] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能的[Attack|攻击]会循环产生多种效果，第一次[Attack|攻击]会对你造成[Hobble|跛行]，连续的第二和第三次[Attack|攻击]分别会大幅提高[Critical|暴击]几率和整体伤害，随后循环效果重置。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Strike|Strikes] you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until you have [Block|Blocked] a certain number of [HitDamage|Hits], but will be [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted] when used. After use, this [Block|Blocked Hit] counter will reset. Cannot Support [Channelling|Channelled] Skills or Skills which already have a [Conditional|Condition] for use.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Strike|打击]技能。被辅助技能只有在你[Block|格挡]一定次数的[HitDamage|击中]后才能使用，但使用时会获得[AncestralBoost|先祖加持]。使用后[Block|格挡]计数会重置。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能或存在其他使用[Conditional|条件]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that leap into the air and deal damage, causing them to create [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground] the first time they [Critical|Critically Hit] an enemy.
SupportText.zh: 辅助会跳跃并造成伤害的技能，使其在第一次对敌人造成[Critical|暴击]时制造[ShockedGround|感电地面]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Strike] Skills. After you [ThornsRetaliation|Retaliate] with [Thorns] Damage, you also deal your [Thorns] damage to enemies you [HitDamage|Hit] with Supported Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Strike|打击]技能。当你用[Thorns|荆棘]伤害进行[ThornsRetaliation|反击]后，你同时会对被辅助技能[HitDamage|击中]的敌人造成你的[Thorns|荆棘]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Strike] Skills. After you [ThornsRetaliation|Retaliate] with [Thorns] Damage, you also deal your [Thorns] damage to enemies you [HitDamage|Hit] with Supported Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Strike|打击]技能。当你用[Thorns|荆棘]伤害进行[ThornsRetaliation|反击]后，你同时会对被辅助技能[HitDamage|击中]的敌人造成你的[Thorns|荆棘]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Strike] Skills. After you [ThornsRetaliation|Retaliate] with [Thorns] Damage, you also deal your [Thorns] damage twice to enemies you [HitDamage|Hit] with Supported Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Strike|打击]技能。当你用[Thorns|荆棘]伤害进行[ThornsRetaliation|反击]后，你会对被辅助技能[HitDamage|击中]的敌人造成两次你的[Thorns|荆棘]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing Enemies [Chill|Chilled] by those Surfaces to be more easily [Frozen], but at the cost of some [Chill] magnitude.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生地面效果的技能，被地面效果[Chill|冰缓]的敌人更容易被[Frozen|冻结]，但会牺牲一定的[Chill|冰缓]强度。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] Enemies, causing [Knockback] from those [HitDamage|Hits] to be significantly more effective.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使[HitDamage|击中]产生的[Knockback|击退]效果大幅提高。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill that [HitDamage|Hits] Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more [Charm] charges.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其击败敌人后获得更多的[Charm|咒符]充能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing you to deal increased [Thorns] Damage while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能时，提高你造成的[Thorns|荆棘]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing you to deal increased [Thorns] Damage while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能时，提高你造成的[Thorns|荆棘]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing you to deal increased [Spell] Damage while on full [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能且[EnergyShield|能量护盾]已满时，提高你造成的[Spell|法术]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing you to deal increased [Spell] Damage while on full [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能且[EnergyShield|能量护盾]已满时，提高你造成的[Spell|法术]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing you to deal increased [Attack] Damage while on [LowLife|Low Life] while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能且[LowLife|低血]时，提高你造成的[Attack|攻击]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing you to deal increased [Attack] Damage while on [LowLife|Low Life] while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能且[LowLife|低血]时，提高你造成的[Attack|攻击]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing your [Minion|Minions] to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能且你的魔力未满时，提高你的[Minion|召唤生物]造成的伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing your [Minion|Minions] to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能且你的魔力未满时，提高你的[Minion|召唤生物]造成的伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing [Freeze] applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能时，缩短对你施加的[Freeze|冻结]的持续时间。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing [Ignite] applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能时，缩短对你施加的[Ignite|点燃]的持续时间。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing [Shock] applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Buff|增益状态]技能，激活被辅助技能时，缩短对你施加的[Shock|感电]的持续时间。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, you gain increased [Evasion|Evasion Rating], with the increase scaling higher the longer the [Attack] time of the supported Skill. Cannot Support [Channelling] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Attack|攻击]技能。使用被辅助技能时你的[Evasion|闪避值]提高，被辅助技能的[Attack|攻击]时间越长该比例越高。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Banner] Skills, causing those affected by [Aura|Auras] they create to gain Refractive Plating, a [Buff] which grants [Deflect|Deflection Rating] and causes [Armour] to partially apply to [ElementalDamage|Elemental Hit Damage].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Banner|旗帜]技能，使受到其[Aura|光环]影响的目标获得折射镀层[Buff|增益状态]，提供[Deflect|偏转值]，使一部分[Armour|护甲]能够对[ElementalDamage|元素击中伤害]生效。

SupportText.en: Supports [Banner] Skills, causing those affected by [Aura|Auras] they create to gain Refractive Plating, a [Buff] which grants [Deflect|Deflection Rating] and causes [Armour] to partially apply to [ElementalDamage|Elemental Hit Damage].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Banner|旗帜]技能，使受到其[Aura|光环]影响的目标获得折射镀层[Buff|增益状态]，提供[Deflect|偏转值]，使一部分[Armour|护甲]能够对[ElementalDamage|元素击中伤害]生效。

SupportText.en: Supports [Banner] Skills, causing Enemies within their area to gain Refractive Dissolution, a [Debuff] which lowers [Resistances|Elemental Resistances].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Banner|旗帜]技能，使其范围内的敌人获得折射消散效果，该[Debuff|减益状态]会降低[Resistances|元素抗性]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], preventing you from having more than one of that [Totem] but granting significant benefits for Supported [Totem|Totems] based how many allied [Totem|Totems] are near them. Does not Support Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可创建[Totem|图腾]的技能，但仅允许拥有一个该种[Totem|图腾]，但会依据周围友军拥有的[Totem|图腾]数量，为被辅助的[Totem|图腾]提供显著增益。无法辅助由[Minion|召唤生物]施放的技能。

SupportText.en: [DNT] Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], limiting their active [Totem] count to one but granting significant benefits for supported [Totem|Totems] based how many allied [Totem|Totems] are near them. Does not support Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助放置[Totem|图腾]的技能，将能够激活的[Totem|图腾]数量限制为一个，并根据不受限制时的[Totem|图腾][Limit|上限]，为被辅助的[Totem|图腾]提供大幅加成。无法辅助[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], preventing having more than one active [Totem] but causing that [Totem] to splinter into smaller versions of itself after it uses an [Attack] or [Spell], with each [Totem] becoming less effective. Each splintered [Totem] can further splinter, up to a maximum. Does not Support Skills used by [Minion|Minions]. Only one [Totem] can be splintering at a time.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可创建[Totem|图腾]的技能，但仅允许存在一个激活的[Totem|图腾]。该[Totem|图腾]在使用[Attack|攻击]或[Spell|法术]后会分裂为若干小型分身，且每个分裂出来的[Totem|图腾]效果会减弱。分裂产生的[Totem|图腾]可继续分裂，直至达到最大分裂次数。无法辅助由[Minion|召唤生物]施放的技能。同一时间仅能有一个[Totem|图腾]处于分裂状态。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], preventing having more than one active [Totem] but causing that [Totem] to splinter into smaller versions of itself after it uses an [Attack] or [Spell], with each [Totem] becoming less effective. Each splintered [Totem] can further splinter, up to a maximum. Does not Support Skills used by [Minion|Minions]. Only one [Totem] can be splintering at a time.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可创建[Totem|图腾]的技能，但仅允许存在一个激活的[Totem|图腾]。该[Totem|图腾]在使用[Attack|攻击]或[Spell|法术]后会分裂为若干小型分身，且每个分裂出来的[Totem|图腾]效果会减弱。分裂产生的[Totem|图腾]可继续分裂，直至达到最大分裂次数。无法辅助由[Minion|召唤生物]施放的技能。同一时间仅能有一个[Totem|图腾]处于分裂状态。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, you gain increased [Armour], with the increase scaling higher the longer the [Attack] time of the supported Skill. Cannot Support [Channelling] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Attack|攻击]技能。使用被辅助技能时你的[Armour|护甲]提高，被辅助技能的[Attack|攻击]时间越长该比例越高。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills apply [EasyTargetDebuff|Easy Target] when [Knockback|Knocking Back] Enemies, causing the next [Projectile] [Attack] [HitDamage|Hit] they take to deal increased Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能[Knockback|击退]敌人时施加[EasyTargetDebuff|活靶子]，使其受到的下一次[Projectile|投射物][Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]造成更高的伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills you use or [Trigger] yourself. [KillingBlow|Killing Blows] with Supported Skills on [Bleeding] enemies create a Blood [Remnant]. Blood [Remnant|Remnants] increase your Life regeneration rate for a short while after being collected.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用或你自己[Trigger|触发]的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能对[Bleeding|流血]的敌人造成[KillingBlow|最后一击]会产生一个赤色[Remnant|残片]。收集赤色[Remnant|残片]会在短时间里提高你的生命回复速度。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] you use or [Trigger] yourself. On-Kill effects caused by [KillingBlow|Killing Blows] with Supported Skills on [Bleeding] enemies have a chance to occur twice.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用或你自己[Trigger|触发]的[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]。被辅助技能对[Bleeding|流血]的敌人造成[KillingBlow|最后一击]产生的击败效果有几率生效两次。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills build up [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] more quickly, but cannot themselves [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能积蓄[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]的速度更快，但其本身无法造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills build up [HeavyStun|Stun] more quickly, but cannot themselves [HeavyStun|Stun].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战][Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能积蓄[HeavyStun|晕眩]的速度更快，但其本身无法造成[HeavyStun|晕眩]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Warcry] Skills. [Attack|Attacks] [Empowered] by Supported Skills have a chance not to lower the [Empowered|Empowerment] count of Supported Skills when they are used.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Warcry|战吼]技能。被辅助技能[Empowered|强化]的[Attack|攻击]使用时有几率不减少被辅助技能的[Empowered|强化]次数。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Strike] Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills trigger Volcanic Eruption on [HitDamage|Hit] against [Ignite|Ignited] Enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Melee|近战][Strike|打击]技能。被辅助技能[HitDamage|击中][Ignite|点燃]的敌人时触发熔火喷发。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills are far more likely to inflict [Bleeding] on [HitDamage|Hitting] full Life Enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Attack|攻击]。被辅助技能[HitDamage|击中]满血的敌人时造成[Bleeding|流血]的几率大幅提高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack|Attacks] you use or [Trigger] yourself, causing them to [Consume] the Parried [Debuff] on [HitDamage|Hit] to grant you a [Charges|Frenzy Charge]. Cannot support Skills which already [Consume] the Parried [Debuff].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用或你自己[Trigger|触发]的[Attack|攻击]，使其在[HitDamage|击中]时[Consume|消耗]被招架的[Debuff|减益状态]，使你获得一个[Charges|狂怒球]。无法辅助本就可以[Consume|消耗]被招架的[Debuff|减益状态]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that [HitDamage|Hit] Enemies, causing those [HitDamage|Hits] to [Hobble] [Bleeding] Enemies based on a portion of [Physical|Physical Damage] dealt.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使[HitDamage|击中]能够根据造成[Physical|物理伤害]的一定比例，使[Bleeding|流血]的敌人[Hobble|跛行]。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill that [Consume|Consumes] [Charges], granting a chance for benefits of that [Consume|Consumption] to be doubled.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Consume|消耗][Charges|能量球]的技能，使[Consume|消耗]的加成有几率翻倍。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills inflict [Incision] on [HitDamage|Hit], which causes Enemies to be increasingly more likely to be inflicted with [Bleeding]. All [Incision] is removed from a target on inflicting it with [Bleeding].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能在[HitDamage|击中]时施加[Incision|创口]，使敌人受到[Bleeding|流血]的几率大幅提高。对目标造成[Bleeding|流血]会移除其受到的所有[Incision|创口]。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill you use yourself, causing supported Skill to detonate [Volatility] that is present on you. Supported Skill can only be used while you have a certain amount of [Volatility] and cannot support Skills which already have another [Conditional|Condition].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的任意技能，使被辅助技能引爆你当前具有的[Volatility|无常]。被辅助技能只能在你具有一定数量的[Volatility|无常]后使用，无法辅助已有其他[Conditional|条件]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which require some [Conditional|Condition] to be met for use. Supported Skills can be used an additional time after their [Conditional|Condition] has been met, but meeting that [Conditional|Condition] is harder.
SupportText.zh: 辅助需要满足[Conditional|条件]才能使用的技能。被辅助技能满足[Conditional|条件]后可以额外使用一次，但[Conditional|条件]会更难满足。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that create [Companion|Companions] which can be damaged. [Minion|Minions] created by Supported Skills take a portion of [HitDamage|Hit Damage] you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生能够受到伤害的[Companion|伙伴]的技能。被辅助技能产生的[Minion|召唤生物]会替你承担一定比例的[HitDamage|击中伤害]，但其生命上限降低。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that create [Companion|Companions] which can be damaged. [Minion|Minions] created by Supported Skills take a portion of [HitDamage|Hit Damage] you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life. A percentage of Damage taken this way is [Recoup|Recouped] by you as Life.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生能够受到伤害的[Companion|伙伴]的技能。被辅助技能产生的[Minion|召唤生物]会替你承担一定比例的[HitDamage|击中伤害]，但其生命上限降低。以此方式受到的一部分伤害会[Recoup|吸纳]为你的生命。
