SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Hazard|Hazards]. [Hazard|Hazards] created by Supported Skills have a chance to be rearmed a short duration after triggering.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Hazard|危害]的技能。被辅助技能产生的[Hazard|危害]有几率在触发后的短时间里重新武装。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Hazard|Hazards]. [Hazard|Hazards] created by Supported Skills have a chance to be rearmed a short duration after triggering.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Hazard|危害]的技能。被辅助技能产生的[Hazard|危害]有几率在触发后的短时间里重新武装。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Hazard|Hazards], causing those [Hazard|Hazards] to only be able to trigger immediately after creation or at the end of their duration. Created [Hazard|Hazards] have significantly lowered duration, and deal more damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Hazard|危害]的技能，使[Hazard|危害]只能在产生后立即触发或在持续时间结束时触发。产生的[Hazard|危害]持续时间大幅缩短，并且造成更高的伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which you use yourself. On using Supported Skills while they are [Empowered], you gain [Volatility].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的技能。使用被[Empowered|强化]的被辅助技能会使你获得[Volatility|无常]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which fire [Projectile|Projectiles] that are not ground targeted. [Projectile|Projectiles] from Supported Skills randomly [Fork], [Chain] or [Pierce].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Projectile|投射物]不以地面为目标的技能。被辅助技能的[Projectile|投射物]随机[Fork|分叉]、[Chain|连锁]或[Pierce|穿透]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself. When Supported [Attack|Attacks] are [Empowered], they have significantly lowered cost and raised [Accuracy].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助的[Attack|攻击]被[Empowered|强化]时，其消耗大幅降低，并且提高[Accuracy|命中]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing them to [Impale] on [HitDamage|Hit] but making them unable to Extract [Impale] themselves.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Attack|攻击]，使其在[HitDamage|击中]时造成[Impale|穿刺]，但其本身无法提取[Impale|穿刺]。

SupportText.en: Supports skills which have a benefit for [PerfectTiming|Perfectly Timing] their use. On successfully executing [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing] with Supported Skills, gain [PerfectionBuff|Perfection], which is a powerful damage buff. However, failing to execute any [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing] (even with skills not supported by Perfection) will remove all [PerfectionBuff|Perfection] on you.
SupportText.zh: 辅助在[PerfectTiming|完美时机]使用能获得加成的技能。被辅助技能成功把握[PerfectTiming|完美时机]会获得[PerfectionBuff|完美]增益状态，大幅提高伤害。未能把握[PerfectTiming|完美时机]（包括未受到完美辅助的技能）会移除你身上的所有[PerfectionBuff|完美]状态。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that can be used while moving, causing you to move slower while using them, but granting more damage in exchange.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可在移动时使用的技能，使你在使用技能时移动速度减慢，同时提高伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills. [Bleeding] inflicted with Supported Skills lasts significantly longer, but enemies you inflict [Bleeding] onto with Supported Skills will move and [Attack] faster.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Attack|攻击]技能，被辅助技能造成的[Bleeding|流血]持续时间大幅提高，但会加快被施加[Bleeding|流血]的敌人的移动和[Attack|攻击]速度。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [DetonationTime|Detonate] after some amount of time has elapsed, shortening the time before [DetonationTime|Detonation].
SupportText.zh: 辅助经过一定时间后[DetonationTime|引爆]的技能，缩短[DetonationTime|引爆]前的时间。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [DetonationTime|Detonate] after some amount of time has elapsed, massively shortening the time before [DetonationTime|Detonation] at the cost of Damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助经过一定时间后[DetonationTime|引爆]的技能，大幅缩短[DetonationTime|引爆]前的时间，但会牺牲伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills [Consume] [Maim] on hit, [ArmourBreak|Breaking] a percentage of the [Maim|Maimed] target's [Armour] in doing so. Supported Skills cannot themselves inflict [Maim].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能击中时[Consume|消耗][Maim|瘫痪]，并[ArmourBreak|粉碎][Maim|被瘫痪]目标一定百分比的[Armour|护甲]。被辅助技能自身无法施加[Maim|致残]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills [ArmourBreak|Break Armour] against [ParriedDebuff|Parried] Enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能。被辅助技能对[ParriedDebuff|被招架]敌人施加[ArmourBreak|粉碎护甲]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Mark] Skills. Enemies affected by Supported [Mark|Marks] will have their [ArmourBreak|Armour Broken] by [Physical|Physical Damage] they take.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Mark|印记]技能。受被辅助[Mark|印记]技能影响的敌人，在受到[Physical|物理伤害]时，[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Mark] Skills. Enemies affected by Supported [Mark|Marks] will have their [ArmourBreak|Armour Broken] by [Physical|Physical Damage] they take.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Mark|印记]技能。受被辅助[Mark|印记]技能影响的敌人，在受到[Physical|物理伤害]时，[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging [HitDamage|Hits]. Supported Skills consume a [Charges|Frenzy Charge] on use to powerfully [ArmourBreak|Break Armour].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能。被辅助技能在使用时消耗一个[Charges|狂怒球]，施加强力[ArmourBreak|粉碎护甲]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging [HitDamage|Hits]. [Bleeding] inflicted by those [HitDamage|Hits] is more effective against [Poison|Poisoned] Enemies, and [Poison] inflicted by Supported Skills is more effective against [Bleeding] Enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可以造成[HitDamage|击中]伤害的技能。由这些[HitDamage|击中]造成的[Bleeding|出血]对[Poison|中毒]敌人更有效，而由被辅助技能造成的[Poison|中毒]对[Bleeding|出血]敌人更有效。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills steadily gain more Damage, up to a cap. This Damage bonus is reset if you Dodge Roll or use a [Travel] Skill.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助的技能会逐渐获得更高伤害，直到达到上限。若你使用翻滚闪避或[Travel|旅行]技能，则该加成会重置。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills steadily gain more Damage, up to a cap. This Damage bonus is reset if you Dodge Roll or use a [Travel] Skill.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助的技能会逐渐获得更高伤害，直到达到上限。若你使用翻滚闪避或[Travel|旅行]技能，则该加成会重置。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself. On spending [Rage] with any skill you will gain a [Buff]. Using Supported Skills consumes this [Buff] to grant you [Rage].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的技能，当你通过任何技能消耗[Rage|怒火]时，将获得一个[Buff|增益状态]。使用被辅助的技能会消耗此[Buff|增益状态]并为你提供[Rage|怒火]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Slam|Slam] Skills. Supported Skills create [Hazard|Hazardous] Brambles on the ground that activate after a duration. Enemies which come in contact with these thorns take damage and are [Maim|Maimed]. A maximum of 20 Brambles are allowed at one time. Does not modify Skills used by [Minion|Minions] or [Totem|Totems].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Slam|猛击]技能。被辅助技能在地面产生[Hazard|危害]荆棘，在一段时间后激活。接触这些荆棘的敌人受到伤害并被[Maim|瘫痪]。同时最多允许 20 个荆棘存在。不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]或[Totem|图腾]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill you use or [Trigger] yourself. Supported Skills cannot consume [Charges] or [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] by any means. Cannot Support Skills which require [Charges] or [ElementalInfusion|Infusion] to be used.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用或你自己[Trigger|触发]的技能。被辅助技能无法以任何方式消耗[Charges|能量球]或[ElementalInfusion|灌注]。无法辅助需要消耗[Charges|能量球]或[ElementalInfusion|灌注]才能使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [Shock|Shocking] an enemy with [HitDamage|Hits] from Supported Skills [Trigger|Triggers] Static Shocks, causing that enemy to become a source of [Lightning] damage sending pulses towards nearby enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。使用被辅助的技能[HitDamage|击中]并使敌人[Shock|感电]，会[Trigger|触发]静电脉冲，使该敌人成为一个[Lightning|闪电]伤害源，向附近的敌人释放脉冲。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], causing those [Totem|Totems] to have more Life.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Totem|图腾]的技能，使其产生的[Totem|图腾]拥有更多生命。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], causing those [Totem|Totems] to have more Life.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Totem|图腾]的技能，使其产生的[Totem|图腾]拥有更多生命。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Totem|Totems], causing those [Totem|Totems] to have more Life. [Totem|Totems] created by Supported Skills explode on death, dealing [Physical] damage based on their Life.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Totem|图腾]的技能，使[Totem|图腾]拥有更多生命。被辅助技能产生的[Totem|图腾]被击败时爆炸，根据其生命造成[Physical|物理]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that create Ground Surfaces, causing those Surfaces to grow over time, up to a limit.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生地面效果的技能，使地面效果持续扩张至特定上限。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits]. Living Lightning [Minion|Minions] are created when dealing [Lightning] damage with Supported Skills - bundles of living electricity that target nearby enemies with [Chain|Chaining] [Attack|Attacks]. Enemies will not directly engage these [Minion|Minions], and can pass through them. Does not modify skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能。被辅助技能造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害时产生活体闪电[Minion|召唤生物] - 以[Chain|连锁][Attack|攻击]攻击附近敌人的活体电流。敌人不会直接攻击这些[Minion|召唤生物]，但可以穿过它们。不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits]. Living Lightning [Minion|Minions] are created when dealing [Lightning] damage with Supported Skills - bundles of living electricity that target nearby enemies with [Chain|Chaining] [Attack|Attacks]. Enemies will not directly engage these [Minion|Minions], and can pass through them. Does not modify skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能。被辅助技能造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害时产生活体闪电[Minion|召唤生物] - 以[Chain|连锁][Attack|攻击]攻击附近敌人的活体电流。敌人不会直接攻击这些[Minion|召唤生物]，但可以穿过它们。不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills, causing them to create [IceFragment|Ice Fragments] on killing [Frozen] Enemies. Cannot Support [Totem] Skills and does not modify Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Attack|攻击]技能，使其击败[Frozen|冻结]敌人时产生[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]。无法辅助[Totem|图腾]技能，不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. When Supported Skills [Shock] an enemy that is nearby other [Shock|Shocked] enemies, trigger Electromagnetism, sucking in nearby enemies, [Hinder|Hindering] them, and dealing [Lightning] damage at an interval.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。使用被辅助的技能对敌人施加[Shock|感电]时，且该敌人周围存在其他[Shock|感电]敌人时，将触发电磁力场，使附近敌人[Hinder|缓速]并将其吸入中心，以固定间隔造成[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Projectile|Projectile] skills and any other skills that [Chain|Chain], causing them to [Chain|Chain] more times.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Projectile|投射物]技能及其他可[Chain|连锁]的技能，增加它们的[Chain|连锁]次数。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill you use yourself which can cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits]. Supported Skills [Consume] [Ignite] on [HitDamage|Hit] to create pillars of flame, but cannot themselves inflict [Ignite]. Cannot Support Skills which already [Consume] [Ignite], and does not modify the Skills of [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的可造成[HitDamage|伤害性击中]的任意技能。被辅助技能[HitDamage|击中]时[Consume|消耗][Ignite|点燃]产生烈焰之柱，但其本身无法造成[Ignite|点燃]。无法辅助已经[Consume|消耗][Ignite|点燃]的技能，不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Crossbow] [Ammunition] Skills. Supported Skills have significantly higher [Attack] speed and bolt capacity, but deal less damage and have longer reload time.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Crossbow|战弩][Ammunition|弹药]技能。被辅助技能的[Attack|攻击]速度和弩箭容量大幅提高，但伤害降低，装填时间延长。

SupportText.en: Supports skills which have a benefit for [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing]. Supported Skills grant at least one [Charges|Endurance Charge] when [HitDamage|Hitting] an enemy with [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing].
SupportText.zh: 辅助在[PerfectTiming|完美时机]使用能获得加成的技能。被辅助技能以[PerfectTiming|完美时机][HitDamage|击中]敌人时，至少获得一个[Charges|耐力球]。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, giving it a chance to gain an [Charges|Endurance Charge] when causing a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]时有几率获得一个[Charges|耐力球]。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, giving it a chance to gain an [Charges|Endurance Charge] when causing a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其造成[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]时有几率获得一个[Charges|耐力球]。

SupportText.en: Supports Melee Skills that leap into the air, causing them to create Fissures when you land. Cannot Support [Totem] Skills, and does not modify Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助跃入空中的近战技能，使其落地时产生裂缝。无法辅助[Totem|图腾]技能，不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Shield] Skills, causing you to gain [Guard] on [Stun|Stunning] Enemies with the Supported Skill.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Shield|盾牌]技能，使你用被辅助技能[Stun|晕眩]敌人时获得[Guard|防卫]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Shield] Skills, causing you to gain [Guard] on [Stun|Stunning] Enemies with the Supported Skill.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Shield|盾牌]技能，使你用被辅助技能[Stun|晕眩]敌人时获得[Guard|防卫]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals]. Damaging Explosions caused by [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] from Supported Skills will [Impale] Enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[IceCrystals|冰晶]的技能。被辅助技能的[IceCrystals|冰晶]造成的伤害性爆炸会[Impale|穿刺]敌人。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create shatterable earthen objects. After killing enough Enemies in range of these objects, they will shatter, releasing skittering stone [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生可破坏土质物体的技能。在这些物体范围内击败足够敌人后，它们会破碎，释放出飞掠石[Minion|召唤生物]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create shatterable earthen objects. After killing enough Enemies in range of these objects, they will shatter, releasing skittering stone [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生可破坏土质物体的技能。在这些物体范围内击败足够敌人后，它们会破碎，释放出飞掠石[Minion|召唤生物]。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill which has levels, increasing the level and [Quality], while reducing the cost and [Reservation].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任何有等级的技能，提高等级和[Quality|品质]，同时降低消耗和[Reservation|保留]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Curse] Skills. Enemies [Curse|Cursed] by Supported Skills are [Pacify|Pacified] for the final portion of the Supported [Curse|Curse's] duration.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Curse|诅咒]技能。被辅助技能[Curse|诅咒]的敌人在被辅助[Curse|诅咒]持续时间的最后阶段被[Pacify|宁心]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create objects that are destroyed after being [HitDamage|Hit] a number of times, allowing for them to last for additional [HitDamage|Hits]. Does not modify Skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生被[HitDamage|击中]一定次数后被破坏的物体的技能，使其可以承受额外次数的[HitDamage|击中]。不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that can cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits], granting extra [Chaos] damage and causing [Chaos] damage to [Contributes|Contribute] to [Ignite|Ignites].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能，提供额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害，使[Chaos|混沌]伤害[Contributes|作用于][Ignite|点燃]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that can cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits], granting extra [Chaos] damage and causing [Chaos] damage to [Contributes|Contribute] to [Shock].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能，提供额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害，使[Chaos|混沌]伤害[Contributes|作用于][Shock|感电]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that can cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits], granting extra [Chaos] damage and causing [Chaos] damage to [Contributes|Contribute] to [Freeze|Freeze Buildup].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能，提供额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害，使[Chaos|混沌]伤害[Contributes|作用于][Freeze|冻结积蓄]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that can cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits], granting extra [Chaos] damage and causing [Chaos] damage to [ArmourBreak|Break Armour].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可造成伤害性[HitDamage|击中]的技能，提供额外[Chaos|混沌]伤害，使[Chaos|混沌]伤害[ArmourBreak|粉碎护甲]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that can cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits], causing those [HitDamage|Hits] to treat Enemy [Resistances|Elemental Resistances] as inverted.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可造成[HitDamage|伤害性击中]的技能，使[HitDamage|击中]将敌人的[Resistances|元素抗性]视为反转。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] skills, granting them [Attack] Speed at the cost of Damage or Damage at the cost of [Attack] Speed depending on [WeaponSets|Weapon Set] they are used in. Does not modify skills used by [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Attack|攻击]技能，根据使用的[WeaponSets|武器组]，以伤害为代价提供[Attack|攻击]速度，或以[Attack|攻击]速度为代价提供伤害。不会修改[Minion|召唤生物]使用的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided no other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可升级的技能，在没有其他辅助宝石修改被辅助技能的情况下，提供大量额外等级。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly one other support is used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可升级的技能，在恰好有一个其他辅助宝石修改被辅助技能的情况下，提供额外等级。无法辅助没有等级的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly two other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可升级的技能，在恰好有两个其他辅助宝石修改被辅助技能的情况下，提供额外等级。无法辅助没有等级的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Banner] Skills, causing them to require significantly less [Glory] to use.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Banner|旗帜]技能，使其需要的[Glory|荣耀]大幅降低。

SupportText.en: Supports [Curse] [Spell|Spells] you cast yourself, causing those [Curse|Curses] to ignore the usual [Curse] [Limit], but be reflected back to you when inflicted.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你释放的[Curse|诅咒][Spell|法术]技能，使这些[Curse|诅咒]突破通常的[Curse|诅咒][Limit|上限]，但施放时会将效果反弹至你自身。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] Skills, making them [Reservation|Reserve] Life instead of [Spirit]. Cannot Support Skills which create [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性]技能，使其改为[Reservation|保留]生命而非[Spirit|精魂]。无法辅助产生[Minion|召唤生物]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself that have Cooldowns, dramatically increasing the rate at which those [CooldownRecovery|Cooldowns Recover], but causing you to lose Life, Mana, and Energy Shield when they are used. Cannot Support [Meta] Skills or [Persistent] Skills, or modify the Skills of [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助拥有冷却时间的技能，大幅提升其[CooldownRecovery|冷却回复]速度，但使用时会消耗你的生命、魔力与能量护盾。无法辅助[Meta|非凡]技能、[Persistent|永久性]技能或影响[Minion|召唤生物]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can cause [HitDamage|Damaging Hits]. [Poison] inflicted with Supported Skills deals Damage faster the higher your [Rage].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可造成[HitDamage|伤害性击中]的技能。根据你的[Rage|怒火]数量，被辅助技能施加的[Poison|中毒]伤害生效更快。

SupportText.en: Supports [Cascadable|Cascadable] [Spell|Spells] you cast yourself. Supported [Spell|Spells] [Cascadable|Echo] thrice, but are given a Cooldown. Cannot support skills which already have a Cooldown.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自身施放的[Cascadable|扩散] [Spell|法术]。被辅助的法术产生 3 次[Spell|法术] [Cascadable|回响]，但会增加冷却时间。无法辅助有冷却时间的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack] Skills you use yourself which do not already have some [Conditional|Condition] for use. Supported Skills have a maximum [Critical|Critical Hit chance], but will [ForksCrit|Bifurcate Critical Hit Chance].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用且不具有使用[Conditional|条件]的[Attack|攻击]技能。被辅助技能将拥有最大[Critical|暴击率]，但会[ForksCrit|分叉暴击率]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Command|Commandable Minions] causing you and the Supported [Minion] to gain [UnholyMight|Unholy Might] when you [Command] them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Command|可命令的召唤生物]，使你和被辅助[Minion|召唤生物]在[Command|命令]它们时获得[UnholyMight|不洁之力]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Offering] Skills, causing your [Cascadable|Cascadable] [Spell|Spells] to [Cascadable|Cascade] to the locations of Supported [Offering|Offerings].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Offering|奉献]技能，使你的[Cascadable|可扩散][Spell|法术][Cascadable|扩散]至被辅助的[Offering|奉献]技能的所在位置。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Minion] Skills, granting a chance when Supported [Minion|Minions] die for you to gain an Abyssal Monster Modifier.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|永久性][Minion|召唤生物]的技能，使被辅助的[Minion|召唤生物]为你而被击败后有几率获得一个深渊怪物词缀。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill that can deal damage, causing it to deal more damage for each different [Command] Skill you have used in the past few seconds. Cannot modify the Skills of [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意可造成伤害的技能，根据你在过去几秒内使用过的不同[Command|命令]技能的数量，提高其伤害。无法影响[Minion|召唤生物]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Fire] [Spell] Skills causing you to gain [ElementalArchon|Elemental Archon] when [Ignite|Igniting] with them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Fire|火焰][Spell|法术]技能。用被辅助技能[Ignite|点燃]敌人时有获得[ElementalArchon|元素执政官]。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill that [HitDamage|Hits] Enemies, causing it to deal increasingly higher damage the more [Poison|Poisons] are on the target.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任意[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，目标身上[Poison|中毒]越多，造成的伤害越高。

SupportText.en: [DNT-UNUSED] Ezomyte Four
SupportText.zh: 艾兹麦人四

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which have a benefit for [PerfectTiming|Perfectly Timing] their use. On successfully executing [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing] with Supported Skills, gain Tasalio's Rhythm. Tasalio's Rhythm causes Supported Skills to deal more damage and have shorter [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing] windows for each stack. Failing to execute any [PerfectTiming|Perfect Timing] (even with skills not supported by Tasalio's Rhythm) will remove all Tasalio's Rhythm on you.
SupportText.zh: 辅助在[PerfectTiming|完美时机]使用能获得加成的技能。被辅助技能成功把握[PerfectTiming|完美时机]会获得塔萨里奥的律动。塔萨里奥的律动会使被辅助技能造成更多伤害，且每层律动都会缩短技能的[PerfectTiming|完美时机]判定窗口。未能把握[PerfectTiming|完美时机]（包括未受到塔萨里奥的律动辅助的技能）会移除你身上的所有塔萨里奥的律动。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing [Corpse|Corpses] in the area you land to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可跃向空中的技能。落地时，使你着陆区域内的[Corpse|灵柩]猛烈爆炸，并对周围敌人造成伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that generate [Remnant|Remnants]. Picking up [Remnant|Remnants] from Supported Skills grants [KhatalsRejuvenation|Khatal's Rejuvenation].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可生成[Remnant|残片]的技能。拾取被辅助技能生成的[Remnant|残片]时，将获得[KhatalsRejuvenation|卡塔尔的复苏]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Storm] skills, increasing their [Limit] and causing them to move quickly from the user to the target location, but become less effective. Cannot Support [Trigger|Triggered] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Storm|风暴]技能，增加其数量[Limit|上限]，并使其从玩家处更快移向目标地点，但效果会减弱。无法辅助[Trigger|触发]类技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill that creates [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals], causing that Skill to [Consume] a [Charges|Power Charge] if possible to create [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground] around the [IceCrystals|Crystal].
SupportText.zh: 辅助生成[IceCrystals|冰晶]的技能，若有可能，该技能将[Consume|消耗]一个[Charges|暴击球]以在[IceCrystals|冰晶]周围生成[ChilledGround|冰缓地面]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Mark] Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech [ManaLeech|Mana] to you when you [HitDamage|Hit] them with [Attack|Attacks].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Mark|印记]技能，你的[Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]被施加印记的敌人时可偷取[ManaLeech|魔力]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Mark] Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech [LifeLeech|Life] and [ManaLeech|Mana] to you when you [HitDamage|Hit] them with [Attack|Attacks].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Mark|印记]技能，你的[Attack|攻击][HitDamage|击中]被施加印记的敌人时可偷取[LifeLeech|生命]和[ManaLeech|魔力]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [CullingStrike|Culling] a [Shock|Shocked] enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your [Attack|Attacks] with [Lightning] damage for a short time.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。使用被辅助的技能[CullingStrike|终结][Shock|感电]状态的敌人时，将为你的所有[Attack|攻击]短暂附加[Lightning|闪电]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [CullingStrike|Culling] a [Shock|Shocked] enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your [Attack|Attacks] with [Lightning] damage and grants an increased chance to [Shock] for a short time.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。使用被辅助的技能[CullingStrike|终结][Shock|感电]状态的敌人时，将为你的所有[Attack|攻击]短暂附加[Lightning|闪电]伤害并提高[Shock|感电]几率。

SupportText.en: Supports [Warcry|Warcries]. Supported Skills apply [Exposure] on [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Warcry|战吼]技能。被辅助的技能在[HitDamage|击中]敌人时会施加[Exposure|曝露]效果。

SupportText.en: Supports [Travel] Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [HitDamage|Hits] with Supported Skills against enemies on full life will [Daze].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的[Travel|旅行]技能。被辅助的技能对满血敌人的[HitDamage|击中]将造成[Daze|恍惚]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Plant] Skills, causing them to [Trigger] an explosion after they have been [Plant|Overgrown].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Plant|植物技能与蔓生]，使其在[Plant|蔓生]后[Trigger|触发]爆炸。

SupportText.en: Supports [Plant] Skills, causing them to [Trigger] an explosion after they have been [Plant|Overgrown], [Blind|Blinding] enemies [HitDamage|Hit].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Plant|植物技能与蔓生]，使其在[Plant|蔓生]后[Trigger|触发]爆炸，并[Blind|致盲]被[HitDamage|击中]的敌人。

SupportText.en: Supports [Wind] Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [HitDamage|Hits] with Supported Skills against [Ignite|Ignited] enemies [Trigger] a fiery explosion, dealing damage to that enemy and enemies in a cone behind them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的[Wind|风系]技能。被辅助的技能[HitDamage|击中]处于[Ignite|点燃]状态的敌人将[Trigger|触发]火焰爆炸，对该敌人及其身后的锥形区域内的敌人造成伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Wind] Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [HitDamage|Hits] with Supported Skills against [Ignite|Ignited] enemies [Trigger] a fiery explosion, dealing damage to that enemy and enemies in a cone behind them. The explosion [AilmentSpread|Spreads] the initial enemy's [Ignite] to other enemies [HitDamage|Hit].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的[Wind|风系]技能。被辅助的技能[HitDamage|击中]处于[Ignite|点燃]状态的敌人将[Trigger|触发]火焰爆炸，对该敌人及其身后的锥形区域内的敌人造成伤害。该爆炸会将初始敌人的[Ignite|点燃]状态[AilmentSpread|传播]给其他被[HitDamage|击中]的敌人。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [Shock|Shocking] an enemy with Supported Skills [Trigger|Triggers] Coursing Current, which sends [Chain|Chaining] [Lightning] [Projectile|Projectiles] to nearby [Drenched] enemies.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。使用被辅助的技能[Shock|感电]敌人会[Trigger|触发]奔雷疾走，向附近处于[Drenched|浸湿]状态的敌人发射[Chain|连锁]的[Lightning|闪电][Projectile|投射物]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Plant] Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. Supported Skills [Trigger] Toxic Pustule on [HitDamage|Hitting] an enemy.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的[Plant|植物技能与蔓生]。被辅助的技能在[HitDamage|击中]敌人时[Trigger|触发]剧毒芽孢。

SupportText.en: Supports [Curse] Skills, giving them a short cooldown but causing them to create areas which [Curse] enemies so long as they are within them. [Curse|Cursed] areas from Supported Skills gather power before erupting in a column of annihilating light after a moderate delay.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Curse|诅咒]类技能。被辅助技能会拥有短暂的冷却时间，但会生成多个区域，敌人处于区域内将持续被[Curse|诅咒]。被辅助技能生成的[Curse|诅咒]区域会积蓄力量，经过短暂延迟后迸发一束摧残之光。

SupportText.en:
Supports [Attack|Attacks] and [Warcry|Warcries] you use yourself. Supported Skills gain a [Glory] requirement, and build [Glory] when you spend Life on Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage and have significantly
 increased area of effect.
SupportText.zh:
辅助你施放的[Attack|攻击]与[Warcry|战吼]。被辅助的技能将需要消耗[Glory|荣耀]，并且当你在技能上消耗生命时会积攒[Glory|荣耀]。被辅助的技能会造成更多伤害，并显著
扩大影响范围。

SupportText.en: Supports [Shapeshift|Shapeshifting] Skills, causing them to grant [HelbrymsComposure|Helbrym's Composure] for a brief duration when they cause you to [Shapeshift]. [Shapeshift|Shapeshifting] into a different form before the [Buff] expires causes it to be removed without effect.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Shapeshift|变形]技能，使你[Shapeshift|变形]时，于短时间内获得[HelbrymsComposure|赫尔布林的沉着]。若在结束前再次[Shapeshift|变形]为不同形态，该[Buff|增益状态]将被移除且不产生效果。

SupportText.en: Supports [Channelling] Skills you use yourself. While [Channelling] Supported Skills, periodically gain stages of Deadly Resolve. Expend a stage of Deadly Resolve when an enemy [HitDamage|Hits] you to [Trigger] a deadly slash towards that enemy, dealing more damage based on your [Armour].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。在[Channelling|持续吟唱]被辅助技能时，会周期性获得致命决心层数，之后当你被[HitDamage|击中]时，消耗一层致命决心，[Trigger|触发]一次致命的斩击，造成的伤害会基于你的[Armour|护甲]提高。

SupportText.en: Supports [Storm] skills, causing them to appear at the user's location and move towards the target location.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Storm|风暴]技能，使其从玩家处产生，并向目标位置移动。

SupportText.en: Supports [Warcry|Warcries]. Supported Skills [Cascadable|Echo] twice, and their area grows larger each time, but are less effective and require you to have travelled a certain distance before use.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Warcry|战吼]类技能。被辅助技能会[Cascadable|回响] 2 次，每次范围扩大，但效果降低，并且需要你在使用前移动一定距离。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that consume [Corpse|Corpses]. Consuming [Corpse|Corpses] with supported skills grants [Flask] charges.
SupportText.zh: 辅助消耗[Corpse|灵柩]的技能。使用被辅助的技能消耗[Corpse|灵柩]会获得[Flask|药剂]充能。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which generate [Charges]. When generating [Charges|Power Charge] with Supported Skills, [Empowered|Empower] some of your [Attack|Attacks] to [Trigger] Spark [Projectile|Projectiles] on use.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可生成[Charges|能量球]的技能。当你使用被辅助的技能生成[Charges|暴击球]时，会[Empowered|强化]你的部分[Attack|攻击]，使其在使用时[Trigger|触发]火花[Projectile|投射物]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which generate [Charges]. When generating [Charges|Power Charge] with Supported Skills, [Empowered|Empower] some of your [Attack|Attacks] to [Trigger] Spark [Projectile|Projectiles] on use.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可生成[Charges|能量球]的技能。当你使用被辅助的技能生成[Charges|暴击球]时，会[Empowered|强化]你的部分[Attack|攻击]，使其在使用时[Trigger|触发]火花[Projectile|投射物]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Hazard|Hazards], causing those [Hazard|Hazards] to be unable to be triggered for 3 seconds after being created.
SupportText.zh: 辅助产生[Hazard|危害]的技能，使这些[Hazard|危害]在生成后的 3 秒内无法被触发。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which can [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [HitDamage|Hits] with Supported Skills which [Freeze] enemies cause [Physical] damage against them to [ArmourBreak|Break their Armour] while they remain [Freeze|Frozen].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。若使用被辅助技能[HitDamage|击中]，从而使敌人[Freeze|冻结]，在其保持[Freeze|冻结]状态期间，对其造成的[Physical|物理]伤害会造成[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Strike|Strikes] that perform a [FinalStrike|Final Strike] at the end of a combination of attacks, causing the [FinalStrike|Final Strike] to [ArmourBreak|Break Armour] based on a portion of [Attack] damage dealt.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可在连击结束时发动[FinalStrike|绝杀打击]的[Strike|打击]技能，使该[FinalStrike|绝杀打击]能基于所造成的[Attack|攻击]伤害的一部分使敌人[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunning] an enemy with Supported Skills increases your [Spell] damage for a duration.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。使用被辅助的技能使敌人[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]后，会在持续一段时间内提高你的[Spell|法术]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [HeavyStun|Heavy Stunning] an enemy with Supported Skills increases your [Spell] damage for a duration.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。使用被辅助的技能使敌人[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]后，会在持续一段时间内提高你的[Spell|法术]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills you use yourself which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. [Critical|Critical Hits] with Supported Skills imbue all of your [Attack|Attacks] with [Fire] damage for a duration.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能。使用被辅助的技能造成[Critical|暴击]后，会在持续一段时间内为你所有的[Attack|攻击]附加[Fire|火焰]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Spell|Spells] which [HitDamage|Hit] enemies. Supported Skills [Daze] on [Critical|Critically Hitting] enemies with [Physical] damage.
SupportText.zh: 辅助可[HitDamage|击中]敌人的[Spell|法术]。被辅助的技能若以[Physical|物理]伤害对敌人造成[Critical|暴击]，则会使其[Daze|恍惚]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Mark] Skills, causing them to not be [Consume|Consumed] the first time they are [MarkActivate|Activated].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Mark|印记]技能，使其第一次[MarkActivate|激活]时不会被[Consume|消耗]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which are boosted by [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surfaces], [Trigger|Triggering] Catalysing Discharge of the corresponding type when they are boosted by an allied [ElementalGround|Elemental Ground Surface].
SupportText.zh: 辅助那些可通过[ElementalGround|元素地面效果]获得强化的技能。当它们因友方创造的[ElementalGround|元素地面效果]而获得强化时，将[Trigger|触发]相应类型的催化迸放效果。

SupportText.en: Supports [Projectile|Projectile] Skills, making them fire extra [Projectile|Projectiles] in a circle, at the cost of Damage and gaining a cooldown. Does not Support Skills which rain down [Projectile|Projectiles] from above. Cannot Support Skills which already have a cooldown.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Projectile|投射物]类技能，使其以环形发射额外[Projectile|投射物]，但会降低伤害并获得冷却时间。无法辅助从空中降下[Projectile|投射物]的技能，也无法辅助已有冷却时间的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Mark] Skills, causing them to [Trigger] Charged Mark when they are [MarkActivate|Activated]. Charged Mark creates [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground] at the target's location.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Mark|印记]技能，使其[MarkActivate|激活]时[Trigger|触发]充能印记。充能印记会在目标位置生成[ShockedGround|感电地面]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Minion|Minions] which [Strike], causing those [Minion|Minions]' [Strike|Strikes] to have [MeleeSplash|Melee Splash].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可创造[Minion|召唤生物]并进行[Strike|打击]的技能，使这些[Minion|召唤生物]的[Strike|打击]获得[MeleeSplash|近战伤害扩散]效果。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which create [Minion|Minions] which [Strike], increasing their Area of Effect and causing those [Minion|Minions]' [Strike|Strikes] to have [MeleeSplash|Melee Splash].
SupportText.zh: 辅助可创造[Minion|召唤生物]并进行[Strike|打击]的技能，扩大其效果范围，并使这些[Minion|召唤生物]的[Strike|打击]获得[MeleeSplash|近战伤害扩散]效果。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent|Persistent] [Buff] Skills, causing enemies that enter your [Presence] to become [Intimidate|Intimidated] while the Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|持续性] [Buff|增益状态]技能。技能激活时，进入你[Presence|存在]范围内的敌人会[Intimidate|被威吓]。

SupportText.en: Supports non-[Channelling] skill you use yourself that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to gain [Critical|Critical Hit] chance based on [Rage], but also remove all [Rage] upon [Critical|Critically Hitting].
SupportText.zh: 辅助任何你施放的、能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人的非[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能，使其根据[Rage|怒气]获得[Critical|暴击]几率，但当你[Critical|暴击]时也会使你失去所有[Rage|怒气]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent] [Buff] Skills, providing a chance for enemies to calculate their [HitDamage|Hits] as though your [Resistances] were 90% while the skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|持续性] [Buff|增益状态]技能。技能激活时，有几率使敌人的[HitDamage|击中]视你的[Resistances|抗性]为 90%来计算。

SupportText.en: Supports skills with Cooldowns, causing them to grant [OverflowingChalice|Overflowing Chalice] when used. Supported skills deal more damage during the effect of your Life Flask and have increased Mana Cost [Efficiency] during the effect of your Mana Flask.
SupportText.zh: 辅助有冷却时间的技能，使其在使用时获得[OverflowingChalice|满溢圣杯]。被辅助技能在生命药剂生效期间造成更多伤害，并在魔力药剂生效期间提高魔力消耗[Efficiency|效能]。

SupportText.en: Supports non-instant [Spell|Spells] you cast yourself. Supported [Spell|Spells] will [Trigger] Fragment Self, creating a Fractured Mimic which will cast that [Spell] if you get enough of them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己施放的非瞬发[Spell|法术]。被辅助的[Spell|法术]将[Trigger|触发]“破碎拟像”，创造一个破碎拟像，若你获得足够数量的拟像，它们将施放该[Spell|法术]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent|Persistent] [Buff|Buff] Skills, causing you periodically grant [Guard] to allies in your [Presence] while the Skill is active.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|持续性] [Buff|增益状态]技能。技能激活时，定期为你[Presence|存在]范围内的盟友提供[Guard|防卫]。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills which summon [Companion|Companions] causing them to be [Gigantic] and gain [Evasion] and [Deflect|Deflection] based on your own.
SupportText.zh: 辅助召唤[Companion|伙伴]的技能，使其体型变为[Gigantic|庞然大物]，并获得基于你自身的[Evasion|闪避]和[Deflect|偏转]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Lightning] skills that [HitDamage|Hit] targets, granting them an additional level and causing them to [BooleanDamageRoll|only roll the minimum or maximum value] for [Lightning] damage. Does not support skills which do not have levels.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[HitDamage|击中]目标的[Lightning|闪电]技能，使其等级 +1，并且造成的[Lightning|闪电]伤害[BooleanDamageRoll|仅取最小值或最大值]。无法辅助没有等级的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing it to [ArmourBreak|Break Armour] of enemies it [Freeze|Freezes] or [Electrocute|Electrocutes].
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使其对[Freeze|冻结]或[Electrocute|触电]的敌人造成[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Lightning] or [Cold] skills you use yourself which fire [Projectile|Projectiles] and do not already have cooldowns, adding a cooldown and making the [Projectile|Projectiles] return, piercing through targets as they do so.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你使用的、发射[Projectile|投射物]且尚无冷却时间的[Lightning|闪电]或[Cold|冰霜]技能，增加技能冷却时间，并使[Projectile|投射物]能够返回，返回时穿透目标。

SupportText.en: Supports [Warcry|Warcries], causing them to destroy [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] and [IceFragment|Ice Fragments]. Supported Skills empower additional [Attack|Attacks] if they destroy enough [IceCrystals|Ice Crystals] and [IceFragment|Ice Fragments].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Warcry|战吼]类技能，使其能够摧毁[IceCrystals|冰晶]和[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]。若被辅助技能摧毁足够数量的[IceCrystals|冰晶]和[IceFragment|冰霜碎片]，则会强化额外的[Attack|攻击]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee] [Attack] Skills. Supported Skills gain [Combo] when you successfully [Strike] Enemies with other [Melee] [Attack|Attacks]. Supported Skills expend their [Combo] when used, gaining more area of effect the higher [Combo] they had. Cannot support skills which already gain [Combo]. Cannot modify the Skills of [Minion|Minions].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Melee|近战] [Attack|攻击]技能。当你使用其他[Melee|近战] [Attack|攻击]成功[Strike|打击]敌人时，被辅助技能获得[Combo|连击]。被辅助技能使用时花费[Combo|连击]数，使用时[Combo|连击]数越高，获得的效果区域越大。无法辅助能获得[Combo|连击]的技能。无法修改[Minion|召唤生物]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports non-instant skills which have a cooldown, granting them two additional cooldown uses and more damage per different skill with a cooldown you have used recently.
SupportText.zh: 辅助有冷却时间的非瞬发技能，为其增加 2 次额外的冷却使用次数，并且你近期每使用一种不同的具有冷却时间的技能，被辅助技能就会获得更多伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports [Melee|Melee Attacks] you use yourself, causing them to attack faster the more [Rage] you have and grant [Rage] on Hit, but also making you lose Life based on your [Rage] when using them.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你施展的[Melee|近战攻击]，使其根据你拥有的[Rage|怒气]提高攻击速度，并在击中时提供[Rage|怒气]，但使用时也会根据你的[Rage|怒气]损失生命。

SupportText.en: Supports skills which [HitDamage|Hit] targets and have an area of effect, increasing the affected area and causing it to [HitDamage|Hit] [Isolated] targets harder.
SupportText.zh: 辅助具有效果区域且能[HitDamage|击中]目标的技能，使其范围扩大，并对[Isolated|孤立]目标造成更高的[HitDamage|击中]伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Skills that Raise your Shield causing your other melee skills to deal more damage if you block.
SupportText.zh: 辅助架盾技能，使你在格挡时，其他近战技能造成更多伤害。

SupportText.en: Supports Shield Skills that [HitDamage|Hit] enemies, causing those Hits to [Crushed|Crush] their targets, additionally causing any [Physical|Physical Damage] [HitDamage|Hits] against those targets while [Crushed] to [ArmourBreak|Break their Armour].
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人的盾牌技能，使这些击中能够[Crushed|碾压]目标。此外，在被[Crushed|碾压]期间，针对这些目标的任何[Physical|物理伤害][HitDamage|击中]都会造成[ArmourBreak|护甲破损]。

SupportText.en: Supports skills which create [Companion|Companions], causing enemies near them to be [Blind|Blinded] and [Ignite|Ignited]. The damage of the [Ignite] is based on the Life of the supported [Minion].
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够创造[Companion|伙伴]的技能，[Blind|致盲]并[Ignite|点燃]伙伴附近的敌人。[Ignite|点燃]伤害基于被辅助召唤生物的生命值。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing them to deal more damage and trigger Nature's Exchange when consuming [Freeze] on enemies. Cannot support skills that [Consume|Consume] [Freeze|Freeze].
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，造成更多伤害，并在消耗敌人的[Freeze|冰冻]时触发自然交换。无法辅助会[Consume|消耗][Freeze|冰冻]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Cascadable|Cascadable] [Spell|Spells] you cast yourself, [Seal|Sealing] them when you [Block], The [Seal|Seals] are broken when used, each making the [Spell] [Cascadable|Echo]. Cannot support skills with a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己施放的[Cascadable|可扩散][Spell|法术]，在你[Block|格挡]时为其附加[Seal|封印]。使用时打破[Seal|封印]，每层封印使该[Spell|法术]产生一次[Cascadable|回响]。无法辅助有冷却时间或能获得封印的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack|Attacks], causing a Runic Shockwave to erupt under enemies they [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun]. The Shockwave costs [Ward|Runic Ward], and will not [Trigger] if you do not have enough [Ward|Runic Ward].
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Attack|攻击]，使被你[HeavyStun|重度晕眩]的敌人脚下爆发出符文震波。该冲击波消耗[Ward|符文结界]，若你的[Ward|符文结界]不足，则不会[Trigger|触发]。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack|Attacks] you use or [Trigger] yourself, causing them to cost [Ward|Runic Ward] to use but deal additional [Physical] damage based on their [Ward|Runic Ward] cost. Cannot Support [Channelling] Skills, [Sustained] Skills, or Skills without a cost.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用或你自己[Trigger|触发]的[Attack|攻击]，使其使用时消耗[Ward|符文结界]，并根据其消耗的[Ward|符文结界]值造成额外[Physical|物理]伤害。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能、[Sustained|持续性]技能或或无消耗的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack|Attacks] you use yourself, causing them to [Consume] [ArmourBreak|Fully Broken Armour] on enemies to fire a nova of runic [Projectile|Projectiles] at the cost of [Ward|Runic Ward]. The [Projectile|Projectiles] cannot [HitDamage|Hit] the enemy from which they originated. Cannot support skills that [Consume|Consume] [ArmourBreak|Broken Armour].
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自身施放的[Attack|攻击]技能，使其[Consume|消耗]敌人的[ArmourBreak|护甲完全破损]状态，以[Ward|符文结界]为代价，发射一圈符文[Projectile|投射物]。这些[Projectile|投射物]无法[HitDamage|击中]产生它们的敌人。无法辅助[Consume|消耗][ArmourBreak|护甲破损]的技能。

SupportText.en: Supports any Skill that deals damage. Enemies you kill with supported Skills have a chance to drop a [VerisiumInfusion|Verisium Infusion] [Remnant].
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够造成伤害的技能。使用被辅助技能击杀的敌人有几率掉落一个[VerisiumInfusion|维金灌注][Remnant|残片]。

SupportText.en: Supports any skill that [HitDamage|Hits] enemies, causing inflicted [Ignite|Ignites] to deal more damage but the skill to gain a [Ward|Runic Ward] cost.
SupportText.zh: 辅助任何[HitDamage|击中]敌人的技能，使施加的[Ignite|点燃]造成更多伤害，但该技能会获得[Ward|符文结界]消耗。

SupportText.en: Supports [Slam|Slams] you use yourself, allowing them to spend large amounts of [Ward|Runic Ward] to become Runically Boosted. Runically Boosted [Slam|Slams] are [Empowered] with extra [Physical] damage and create a rune the first time they hit an enemy. The rune erupts in an [Aftershock] after a duration. Cannot support [Channelling] Skills.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用的[Slam|猛击]技能，使其能够消耗大量[Ward|符文结界]以获得符文加持。符文加持的[Slam|猛击]技能获得额外的[Physical|物理]伤害[Empowered|强化]，并在首次击中敌人时创造一个符文。该符文经过一段时间后会以[Aftershock|余震]的形式爆发。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能。

SupportText.en: Supports [Persistent|Persistent] [Buff|Buff] Skills, causing you to lose [Ward|Runic Ward] and heal nearby allies based on the [Ward] lost. Healing done is split between allies who are not on full Life.
SupportText.zh: 辅助[Persistent|持续性] [Buff|增益状态]技能，使你失去[Ward|符文结界]，并根据失去的[Ward|符文结界]治疗附近的盟友。治疗量在非满生命的盟友之间分摊。

SupportText.en: Supports skills that can [Empowered|Empower] a specific number of other skills, causing them to apply to more skill uses.
SupportText.zh: 辅助能够[Empowered|强化]特定数量其他技能的技能，使其可以应用于更多技能使用次数。

SupportText.en: Supports [Attack|Attacks] you use or [Trigger] yourself, causing them to cost [Ward|Runic Ward] to use but deal additional [Physical] and [Cold] damage based on their [Ward|Runic Ward] cost, in addition to causing [Physical] damage to [Contributes|Contribute] to [Freeze] buildup. Cannot Support [Channelling] Skills, [Sustained] Skills, or Skills without a cost.
SupportText.zh: 辅助你自己使用或你自己[Trigger|触发]的[Attack|攻击]，使其使用时消耗[Ward|符文结界]，并根据消耗的[Ward|符文结界]值造成额外的[Physical|物理]和[Cold|冰霜]伤害，此外，[Physical|物理]伤害也会[Contributes|作用于][Freeze|冻结]积蓄。无法辅助[Channelling|持续吟唱]技能、[Sustained|持续性]技能或无消耗的技能。
